CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.add_to_blacklist(p_whatsapp text, p_motivo text, p_unit_origem text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_matricula_origem text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_evidence jsonb DEFAULT NULL::jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_id BIGINT;
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO blacklist_global(whatsapp, motivo, unit_origem, matricula_origem, raw_evidence)
  VALUES (p_whatsapp, p_motivo, p_unit_origem, p_matricula_origem, p_evidence)
  ON CONFLICT (whatsapp) DO NOTHING
  RETURNING id INTO v_id;
  RETURN jsonb_build_object('ok', true, 'id', v_id, 'inserted', v_id IS NOT NULL);
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.agent_block_customer(p_matricula text, p_motivo text, p_contexto text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(matricula text, motivo_bloqueio text, bloqueado_em timestamp with time zone)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
BEGIN
  IF p_motivo NOT IN ('cancelamento','xingamento','ameaca_legal','ja_pagou') THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'motivo invalido: %', p_motivo
      USING ERRCODE = '22023';
  END IF;

  UPDATE clientes_cobranca_setembro c
    SET bloqueio_disparos = true,
        motivo_bloqueio = p_motivo,
        bloqueado_em = now(),
        bloqueio_contexto = COALESCE(p_contexto, c.bloqueio_contexto),
        updated_at = now()
    WHERE c.matricula = p_matricula;

  IF NOT FOUND THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'matricula nao encontrada: %', p_matricula
      USING ERRCODE = '02000';
  END IF;

  RETURN QUERY
    SELECT c.matricula, c.motivo_bloqueio, c.bloqueado_em
      FROM clientes_cobranca_setembro c
      WHERE c.matricula = p_matricula;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.agent_pause_customer(p_matricula text, p_pausa_motivo text, p_ate date DEFAULT NULL::date, p_data_prometida date DEFAULT NULL::date)
 RETURNS TABLE(matricula text, pausa_motivo text, disparos_pausados_ate date)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_ate date;
BEGIN
  IF p_pausa_motivo NOT IN ('promessa_data','ja_pagou_48h') THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'pausa_motivo invalido: %', p_pausa_motivo
      USING ERRCODE = '22023';
  END IF;

  -- Se o caller não passou data limite, calcular default
  v_ate := COALESCE(
    p_ate,
    CASE p_pausa_motivo
      WHEN 'promessa_data' THEN COALESCE(p_data_prometida, (current_date + interval '1 day')::date)
      WHEN 'ja_pagou_48h'  THEN (current_date + interval '2 days')::date
    END
  );

  -- Sanidade: não aceitar data no passado
  IF v_ate < current_date THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'data de pausa no passado: %', v_ate
      USING ERRCODE = '22023';
  END IF;

  UPDATE clientes_cobranca_setembro c
    SET disparos_pausados_ate = v_ate,
        pausa_motivo = p_pausa_motivo,
        pausa_data_prometida = COALESCE(p_data_prometida, c.pausa_data_prometida),
        pausa_registrada_em = now(),
        updated_at = now()
    WHERE c.matricula = p_matricula;

  IF NOT FOUND THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'matricula nao encontrada: %', p_matricula
      USING ERRCODE = '02000';
  END IF;

  RETURN QUERY
    SELECT c.matricula, c.pausa_motivo, c.disparos_pausados_ate
      FROM clientes_cobranca_setembro c
      WHERE c.matricula = p_matricula;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.assign_admin_role_by_email(user_email text)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
  target_user_id uuid;
BEGIN
  -- Find user by email
  SELECT id INTO target_user_id 
  FROM auth.users 
  WHERE email = user_email;
  
  IF target_user_id IS NOT NULL THEN
    -- Insert admin role if not exists
    INSERT INTO public.user_roles (user_id, role)
    VALUES (target_user_id, 'admin')
    ON CONFLICT (user_id, role) DO NOTHING;
  END IF;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.buscar_links_resgate(p_resgate_count integer DEFAULT 0, p_min_age interval DEFAULT '00:30:00'::interval)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  SELECT COALESCE(
    jsonb_agg(row_to_json(t) ORDER BY t.data_link_gerado ASC),
    '[]'::jsonb
  )
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (l.correlation_id)
      l.correlation_id,
      l.matricula,
      l.whatsapp,
      l.unit_id,
      l.link_pagamento,
      l.pix_copia_cola,
      l.plataforma_pagamento_utilizada AS plataforma,
      l.resgate_count,
      l.data_link_gerado,
      d.numero_telefone AS number_instance,
      d.waba_token
    FROM links_pagamentos_gerados l
    JOIN disparadores_whatsapp d ON d.unit_id = l.unit_id AND d.ativo = true
    LEFT JOIN pagamentos p ON p.correlation_id = l.correlation_id
    LEFT JOIN clientes_cobranca_dashboard c ON c.matricula = l.matricula
    WHERE l.cancelado_at IS NULL
      AND l.resgate_count = p_resgate_count
      AND l.data_link_gerado <= now() - p_min_age
      AND l.data_link_gerado > now() - interval '24 hours'
      AND p.id IS NULL
      AND (c.pagamento_feito IS NULL OR c.pagamento_feito = false)
    ORDER BY l.correlation_id, d.disparos_sucesso_hoje ASC
  ) t;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.buscar_links_resgate_pendente()
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  SELECT COALESCE(
    jsonb_agg(row_to_json(t) ORDER BY t.data_link_gerado ASC),
    '[]'::jsonb
  )
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (l.correlation_id)
      l.correlation_id, l.matricula, l.whatsapp, l.unit_id,
      l.link_pagamento, l.pix_copia_cola,
      l.plataforma_pagamento_utilizada AS plataforma,
      l.resgate_count, l.data_link_gerado,
      d.id AS number_instance, d.waba_token
    FROM links_pagamentos_gerados l
    JOIN disparadores_whatsapp d ON d.unit_id = l.unit_id AND d.ativo = true
    LEFT JOIN pagamentos p ON p.correlation_id = l.correlation_id
    LEFT JOIN clientes_cobranca_dashboard c ON c.matricula = l.matricula
    WHERE l.cancelado_at IS NULL
      AND l.resgate_count = 0
      AND l.data_link_gerado <= now() - interval '30 minutes'
      AND l.data_link_gerado > now() - interval '24 hours'
      AND p.id IS NULL
      AND (c.pagamento_feito IS NULL OR c.pagamento_feito = false)
    ORDER BY l.correlation_id, d.disparos_sucesso_hoje ASC
  ) t;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.cancel_pending_links_on_payment()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
BEGIN
  IF NEW.pagamento_feito = true
     AND (OLD.pagamento_feito IS NULL OR OLD.pagamento_feito = false) THEN
    UPDATE public.links_pagamentos_gerados
    SET cancelado_at = NOW(), status = 'cancelled'
    WHERE matricula = NEW.matricula
      AND status = 'pending'
      AND cancelado_at IS NULL
      AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM public.pagamentos p WHERE p.correlation_id = links_pagamentos_gerados.correlation_id
      );
  END IF;
  RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.chat_admin_list_users()
 RETURNS TABLE(auth_id uuid, profile_id uuid, email text, name text, is_active boolean, is_admin boolean, unit_ids uuid[], last_sign_in_at timestamp with time zone, created_at timestamp with time zone, banned_until timestamp with time zone)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public', 'pg_temp'
AS $function$
  select
    u.id                                              as auth_id,
    p.id                                              as profile_id,
    u.email::text                                     as email,
    p.name                                            as name,
    coalesce(p.is_active, true)                       as is_active,
    public.has_role(u.id, 'admin'::app_role)          as is_admin,
    coalesce(
      array_agg(uu.unit_id) filter (where uu.unit_id is not null),
      '{}'::uuid[]
    )                                                 as unit_ids,
    u.last_sign_in_at                                 as last_sign_in_at,
    u.created_at                                      as created_at,
    u.banned_until                                    as banned_until
  from auth.users u
  left join public.profiles p   on p.user_id = u.id
  left join public.user_units uu on uu.user_id = p.id
  where public.has_role(auth.uid(), 'admin'::app_role)
  group by u.id, p.id, u.email, p.name, p.is_active,
           u.last_sign_in_at, u.created_at, u.banned_until
  order by u.email;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.chat_bump_conversation_window()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SET search_path TO 'public', 'pg_temp'
AS $function$
begin
  if new.direction = 'in' then
    update conversations
       set last_inbound_at            = new.created_at,
           customer_window_expires_at = new.created_at + interval '24 hours'
     where id = new.conversation_id;
  end if;
  return new;
end$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.chat_debtor_context(p_conversation_id uuid)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public', 'pg_temp'
AS $function$
declare
  v_unit uuid; v_wa text; v_key text; v_deb record; v_distinct int;
  v_link jsonb; v_pay jsonb; v_total numeric; v_qtd int;
begin
  select co.unit_id, c.wa_id into v_unit, v_wa
  from public.conversations co join public.contacts c on c.id = co.contact_id
  where co.id = p_conversation_id;

  if v_unit is null then return null; end if;
  if not public.chat_user_has_unit(v_unit) then return null; end if;

  v_key := public.chat_phone_match_key(v_wa);
  if v_key is null then return jsonb_build_object('matched', false); end if;

  select d.* into v_deb
  from public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard d
  where d.unit_id = v_unit and public.chat_phone_match_key(d.whatsapp) = v_key
  order by d.bi_atual desc nulls last, d.updated_at desc nulls last, d.matricula asc
  limit 1;

  if not found then return jsonb_build_object('matched', false); end if;

  select count(distinct d.matricula) into v_distinct
  from public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard d
  where d.unit_id = v_unit and public.chat_phone_match_key(d.whatsapp) = v_key;

  select jsonb_build_object(
           'valor', round(l.valor)/100.0, 'status', l.status,
           'pix_copia_cola', l.pix_copia_cola, 'link', l.link_pagamento,
           'gerado_em', coalesce(l.data_link_gerado, l.created_at), 'expira_em', l.expires_at)
    into v_link
  from public.links_pagamentos_gerados l
  where l.matricula = v_deb.matricula and l.unit_id = v_unit
  order by coalesce(l.data_link_gerado, l.created_at) desc nulls last
  limit 1;

  select jsonb_build_object(
           'valor', round(p.valor)/100.0, 'data', p.data_pagamento,
           'forma', p.forma_pagamento, 'baixa_realizada', p.baixa_realizada)
    into v_pay
  from public.pagamentos p
  where p.matricula = v_deb.matricula and p.unit_id = v_unit
  order by p.data_pagamento desc nulls last
  limit 1;

  select coalesce(sum(p.valor),0), count(*) into v_total, v_qtd
  from public.pagamentos p
  where p.matricula = v_deb.matricula and p.unit_id = v_unit;

  return jsonb_build_object(
    'matched', true, 'ambiguous', v_distinct > 1,
    'name', v_deb.name, 'matricula', v_deb.matricula,
    'valor_aberto', round(v_deb.valor_inadimplente)/100.0,
    'status', v_deb.status, 'regua', v_deb.regua,
    'tentativas', coalesce(v_deb.disparos,0) + coalesce(v_deb.disparos_equipe,0),
    'pagamento_feito', v_deb.pagamento_feito, 'atualizado_em', v_deb.updated_at,
    'ultimo_link', v_link, 'ultimo_pagamento', v_pay,
    'total_pago', round(v_total)/100.0, 'qtd_pagamentos', v_qtd);
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.chat_debtor_names(p_conversation_ids uuid[])
 RETURNS TABLE(conversation_id uuid, name text)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public', 'pg_temp'
AS $function$
  select cv.conversation_id, d.name
  from (
    select co.id as conversation_id, co.unit_id,
           public.chat_phone_match_key(c.wa_id) as key
    from public.conversations co
    join public.contacts c on c.id = co.contact_id
    where co.id = any(p_conversation_ids)
      and public.chat_user_has_unit(co.unit_id)
  ) cv
  join lateral (
    select d.name
    from public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard d
    where d.unit_id = cv.unit_id
      and public.chat_phone_match_key(d.whatsapp) = cv.key
      and d.name is not null and length(trim(d.name)) > 0
    order by d.bi_atual desc nulls last, d.updated_at desc nulls last, d.matricula asc
    limit 1
  ) d on true
  where cv.key is not null;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.chat_log_conversation_transition()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public', 'pg_temp'
AS $function$
begin
  if old.routing is distinct from new.routing
     and new.routing = 'queued'::public.chat_routing_state then
    insert into public.chat_conversation_events
      (conversation_id, event_type, actor_id, from_routing, to_routing)
    values (new.id, 'queued', auth.uid(), old.routing, new.routing);
  end if;

  if old.routing is distinct from new.routing
     and new.routing = 'ai'::public.chat_routing_state then
    insert into public.chat_conversation_events
      (conversation_id, event_type, actor_id, from_routing, to_routing)
    values (new.id, 'returned_to_ai', auth.uid(), old.routing, new.routing);
  end if;

  if new.assigned_operator_id is distinct from old.assigned_operator_id
     and new.assigned_operator_id is not null then
    insert into public.chat_conversation_events
      (conversation_id, event_type, actor_id, from_routing, to_routing)
    values (
      new.id,
      case when old.assigned_operator_id is null
           then 'assigned'::public.chat_conv_event_type
           else 'reassigned'::public.chat_conv_event_type end,
      auth.uid(), old.routing, new.routing
    );
  end if;

  if new.status = 'closed'::public.chat_conversation_status
     and old.status is distinct from new.status then
    insert into public.chat_conversation_events
      (conversation_id, event_type, actor_id, from_status, to_status, outcome, note)
    values (new.id, 'closed', coalesce(new.closed_by, auth.uid()),
            old.status, new.status, new.close_outcome, new.close_note);
  end if;

  return null;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.chat_phone_match_key(phone text)
 RETURNS text
 LANGUAGE sql
 IMMUTABLE
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  select case
    when d is null or length(d) < 8 then null
    else substr(local2, 1, 2) || right(local2, 8)
  end
  from (
    select d,
           case
             when length(d) in (12, 13) and left(d, 2) = '55' then substr(d, 3)
             else d
           end as local2
    from (select regexp_replace(coalesce(phone, ''), '\D', '', 'g') as d) z
  ) y;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.chat_report_attendance(p_from timestamp with time zone, p_to timestamp with time zone, p_unit uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public', 'pg_temp'
AS $function$
with scope as (
  select uu.unit_id
  from user_units uu
  join profiles p on p.id = uu.user_id
  where p.user_id = auth.uid()
    and (p_unit is null or uu.unit_id = p_unit)
),
hand as (
  select c.*
  from conversations c
  where c.unit_id in (select unit_id from scope)
    and c.handoff_reason is not null
    and c.opened_at >= p_from and c.opened_at < p_to
),
closed as (select * from hand where status = 'closed')
select jsonb_build_object(
  'funnel', jsonb_build_object(
    'queued',   (select count(*) from hand),
    'assigned', (select count(*) from hand where assigned_at is not null or assigned_operator_id is not null),
    'closed',   (select count(*) from hand where status = 'closed')
  ),
  'sla', jsonb_build_object(
    'time_to_assign_sec', (select jsonb_build_object(
        'avg', coalesce(round(avg(extract(epoch from (assigned_at - queued_at)))), 0),
        'p50', coalesce(round(percentile_cont(0.5) within group (order by extract(epoch from (assigned_at - queued_at)))), 0),
        'p90', coalesce(round(percentile_cont(0.9) within group (order by extract(epoch from (assigned_at - queued_at)))), 0),
        'n', count(*)
      ) from hand where assigned_at is not null and queued_at is not null),
    'handle_time_sec', (select jsonb_build_object(
        'avg', coalesce(round(avg(extract(epoch from (closed_at - assigned_at)))), 0),
        'p50', coalesce(round(percentile_cont(0.5) within group (order by extract(epoch from (closed_at - assigned_at)))), 0),
        'n', count(*)
      ) from hand where closed_at is not null and assigned_at is not null)
  ),
  'outcomes', (select coalesce(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('outcome', close_outcome, 'n', n) order by n desc), '[]'::jsonb)
    from (select close_outcome, count(*) n from closed where close_outcome is not null group by 1) t),
  'operators', (select coalesce(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
        'operator_id', operator_id, 'name', name, 'closed', closed_n, 'resolved', resolved_n,
        'resolution_rate', coalesce(round(100.0 * resolved_n / nullif(closed_n,0), 1), 0),
        'avg_handle_sec', coalesce(handle_avg, 0)
      ) order by closed_n desc), '[]'::jsonb)
    from (
      select c.closed_by as operator_id, pr.name,
             count(*) closed_n,
             count(*) filter (where c.close_outcome = 'resolvido') resolved_n,
             round(avg(extract(epoch from (c.closed_at - c.assigned_at)))) handle_avg
      from closed c left join profiles pr on pr.user_id = c.closed_by
      where c.closed_by is not null
      group by c.closed_by, pr.name
    ) t)
);
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.chat_report_overview(p_from timestamp with time zone, p_to timestamp with time zone, p_unit uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public', 'pg_temp'
AS $function$
with scope as (
  select uu.unit_id
  from user_units uu
  join profiles p on p.id = uu.user_id
  where p.user_id = auth.uid()
    and (p_unit is null or uu.unit_id = p_unit)
),
conv as (
  select c.*
  from conversations c
  where c.unit_id in (select unit_id from scope)
    and c.opened_at >= p_from and c.opened_at < p_to
),
prev as (
  select c.*
  from conversations c
  where c.unit_id in (select unit_id from scope)
    and c.opened_at >= p_from - (p_to - p_from) and c.opened_at < p_from
),
msg as (
  select m.* from messages m join conv on conv.id = m.conversation_id
)
select jsonb_build_object(
  'kpis', jsonb_build_object(
    'conversations', (select count(*) from conv),
    'handoffs', (select count(*) from conv where handoff_reason is not null),
    'handoff_rate', (select coalesce(round(100.0 * count(*) filter (where handoff_reason is not null) / nullif(count(*),0), 1), 0) from conv),
    'deflection_rate', (select coalesce(round(100.0 * count(*) filter (where handoff_reason is null) / nullif(count(*),0), 1), 0) from conv),
    'messages', (select count(*) from msg),
    'backlog_now', (select count(*) from conversations c
                    where c.unit_id in (select unit_id from scope)
                      and c.status = 'open' and c.routing <> 'ai'
                      and c.assigned_operator_id is null)
  ),
  'prev', jsonb_build_object(
    'conversations', (select count(*) from prev),
    'handoffs', (select count(*) from prev where handoff_reason is not null)
  ),
  'msg_split', (select jsonb_build_object(
      'customer', coalesce(count(*) filter (where direction = 'in'), 0),
      'ai', coalesce(count(*) filter (where sent_by = 'ai'), 0),
      'operator', coalesce(count(*) filter (where sent_by = 'operator'), 0)
    ) from msg),
  'by_reason', (select coalesce(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('reason', handoff_reason, 'n', n) order by n desc), '[]'::jsonb)
    from (select handoff_reason, count(*) n from conv where handoff_reason is not null group by 1) t),
  'by_unit', (select coalesce(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
        'unit_id', unit_id, 'name', name, 'convs', c, 'handoffs', h, 'rate', rate) order by c desc), '[]'::jsonb)
    from (
      select conv.unit_id, u.name, count(*) c,
             count(*) filter (where handoff_reason is not null) h,
             coalesce(round(100.0 * count(*) filter (where handoff_reason is not null) / nullif(count(*),0), 1), 0) rate
      from conv join units u on u.id = conv.unit_id
      group by conv.unit_id, u.name
    ) t),
  'hour_of_day', (select coalesce(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('hour', h, 'n', coalesce(n,0)) order by h), '[]'::jsonb)
    from generate_series(0,23) h
    left join (
      select extract(hour from created_at at time zone 'America/Sao_Paulo')::int hh, count(*) n
      from msg where direction = 'in' group by 1
    ) x on x.hh = h),
  'daily', (select coalesce(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('day', d, 'convs', c, 'handoffs', h) order by d), '[]'::jsonb)
    from (
      select (opened_at at time zone 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date as d,
             count(*) c, count(*) filter (where handoff_reason is not null) h
      from conv group by 1
    ) t)
);
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.check_data_freshness()
 RETURNS integer
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$ DECLARE v_last timestamptz; v_age_min integer; v_status text; v_total integer := 0; v_business_h boolean; v_last_date date; v_age_days integer; BEGIN v_business_h := ((EXTRACT(DOW FROM now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')) BETWEEN 1 AND 5 AND (EXTRACT(HOUR FROM now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')) BETWEEN 9 AND 18); SELECT MAX(data_ultima_mensagem_temp) INTO v_last FROM clientes_cobranca_dashboard; v_age_min := EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - v_last)) / 60; v_status := CASE WHEN v_last IS NULL THEN 'no_data' WHEN v_business_h AND v_age_min > 60 THEN 'stale_business_hours' WHEN NOT v_business_h AND v_age_min > 720 THEN 'stale_offhours' ELSE 'ok' END; INSERT INTO data_freshness_log (source, last_write, age_minutes, status) VALUES ('clientes_cobranca_dashboard.data_ultima_mensagem_temp', v_last, v_age_min, v_status); v_total := v_total + 1; SELECT MAX(hora_link_gerado) INTO v_last FROM clientes_cobranca_dashboard; v_age_min := EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - v_last)) / 60; v_status := CASE WHEN v_last IS NULL THEN 'no_data' WHEN v_business_h AND v_age_min > 120 THEN 'stale_business_hours' WHEN NOT v_business_h AND v_age_min > 1440 THEN 'stale_offhours' ELSE 'ok' END; INSERT INTO data_freshness_log (source, last_write, age_minutes, status) VALUES ('clientes_cobranca_dashboard.hora_link_gerado', v_last, v_age_min, v_status); v_total := v_total + 1; SELECT MAX(data_ultimo_disparo) INTO v_last_date FROM clientes_cobranca_setembro; v_age_days := ((now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date - v_last_date); v_status := CASE WHEN v_last_date IS NULL THEN 'no_data' WHEN v_age_days > 1 THEN 'stale_business_hours' ELSE 'ok' END; INSERT INTO data_freshness_log (source, last_write, age_minutes, status, notes) VALUES ('clientes_cobranca_setembro.data_ultimo_disparo', v_last_date::timestamptz, v_age_days * 1440, v_status, 'coluna eh DATE; age_minutes calculado como dias*1440'); v_total := v_total + 1; SELECT MAX(created_at) INTO v_last FROM links_pagamentos_gerados; v_age_min := EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - v_last)) / 60; v_status := CASE WHEN v_last IS NULL THEN 'no_data' WHEN v_business_h AND v_age_min > 180 THEN 'stale_business_hours' WHEN NOT v_business_h AND v_age_min > 1440 THEN 'stale_offhours' ELSE 'ok' END; INSERT INTO data_freshness_log (source, last_write, age_minutes, status) VALUES ('links_pagamentos_gerados.created_at', v_last, v_age_min, v_status); v_total := v_total + 1; SELECT MAX(data_pagamento) INTO v_last FROM pagamentos WHERE reembolso_realizado IS NOT TRUE; v_age_min := EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - v_last)) / 60; v_status := CASE WHEN v_last IS NULL THEN 'no_data' WHEN v_business_h AND v_age_min > 240 THEN 'stale_business_hours' WHEN NOT v_business_h AND v_age_min > 1440 THEN 'stale_offhours' ELSE 'ok' END; INSERT INTO data_freshness_log (source, last_write, age_minutes, status) VALUES ('pagamentos.data_pagamento', v_last, v_age_min, v_status); v_total := v_total + 1; RETURN v_total; END; $function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.cleanup_expired_links()
 RETURNS integer
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_count integer;
BEGIN
  WITH updated AS (
    UPDATE public.links_pagamentos_gerados l
    SET status = 'expired'
    WHERE l.status = 'pending'
      AND l.expires_at IS NOT NULL
      AND l.expires_at < NOW()
      AND l.cancelado_at IS NULL
      AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM public.pagamentos p WHERE p.correlation_id = l.correlation_id
      )
    RETURNING 1
  )
  SELECT COUNT(*) INTO v_count FROM updated;
  RETURN v_count;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.create_admin_user(p_email text, p_password text, p_name text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS uuid
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public', 'extensions'
AS $function$
DECLARE
  new_user_id uuid;
  encrypted_pw text;
BEGIN
  -- Verificar se usuário já existe
  IF EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM auth.users WHERE email = p_email) THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'Usuário com email % já existe', p_email;
  END IF;
  
  -- Gerar ID único
  new_user_id := gen_random_uuid();
  
  -- FORÇAR uso de pgcrypto com schema explícito
  BEGIN
    -- Tentar com schema public
    encrypted_pw := public.crypt(p_password, public.gen_salt('bf'));
  EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN
    BEGIN
      -- Tentar com schema extensions
      encrypted_pw := extensions.crypt(p_password, extensions.gen_salt('bf'));
    EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN
      BEGIN
        -- Tentar sem schema (padrão)
        encrypted_pw := crypt(p_password, gen_salt('bf'));
      EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN
        -- Último recurso: usar MD5 (pelo menos funciona)
        encrypted_pw := md5(p_password || p_email);
      END;
    END;
  END;
  
  -- Inserir em auth.users
  INSERT INTO auth.users (
    id,
    instance_id,
    email,
    encrypted_password,
    email_confirmed_at,
    created_at,
    updated_at,
    raw_app_meta_data,
    raw_user_meta_data,
    role,
    aud,
    confirmation_token,
    recovery_token,
    email_change_token_new,
    email_change
  ) VALUES (
    new_user_id,
    '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000',
    p_email,
    encrypted_pw,
    now(),
    now(),
    now(),
    '{"provider":"email","providers":["email"]}'::jsonb,
    COALESCE(json_build_object('name', p_name)::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb),
    'authenticated',
    'authenticated',
    '',
    '',
    '',
    ''
  );
  
  -- Inserir identidade
  INSERT INTO auth.identities (
    provider_id,
    user_id,
    identity_data,
    provider,
    last_sign_in_at,
    created_at,
    updated_at
  ) VALUES (
    new_user_id,
    new_user_id,
    format('{"sub":"%s","email":"%s"}', new_user_id::text, p_email)::jsonb,
    'email',
    now(),
    now(),
    now()
  );

  -- Inserir perfil
  INSERT INTO public.profiles (user_id, name, created_at, updated_at, is_active)
  VALUES (new_user_id, COALESCE(p_name, split_part(p_email, '@', 1)), now(), now(), true)
  ON CONFLICT (user_id) 
  DO UPDATE SET 
    name = COALESCE(p_name, split_part(p_email, '@', 1)),
    updated_at = now(),
    is_active = true;
  
  RETURN new_user_id;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.cron_clear_expired_pause(p_matricula text)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
BEGIN
  UPDATE clientes_cobranca_setembro
    SET disparos_pausados_ate = NULL,
        pausa_motivo = NULL,
        pausa_registrada_em = NULL,
        updated_at = now()
    WHERE matricula = p_matricula
      AND disparos_pausados_ate IS NOT NULL
      AND disparos_pausados_ate <= current_date;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.cron_unblock_expired()
 RETURNS integer
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_count integer;
BEGIN
  UPDATE clientes_cobranca_setembro
    SET bloqueio_disparos = false,
        motivo_bloqueio = NULL,
        bloqueado_em = NULL,
        bloqueio_contexto = NULL,
        updated_at = now()
    WHERE bloqueio_disparos = true
      AND bloqueado_em < now() - interval '30 days';

  GET DIAGNOSTICS v_count = ROW_COUNT;
  RETURN v_count;
END;
$function$

  UPDATE pagamentos_orfaos

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_cobranca_aggregates(_start_ts timestamp with time zone, _end_ts timestamp with time zone, _cdt_code text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(regua text, valor_cobrado numeric, valor_pago numeric)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  SELECT
    -- Determinar régua: se NULL, usar valor_inadimplente para classificar
    CASE 
      WHEN regua IS NOT NULL THEN regua
      WHEN valor_inadimplente = 3090 THEN '1'
      WHEN valor_inadimplente = 6180 THEN '2'
      ELSE regua -- mantém NULL se não corresponder
    END AS regua,
    -- Valor em aberto: SEMPRE filtra por hora_link_gerado no período (igual ao KPI)
    COALESCE(SUM(
      CASE 
        WHEN link_pagamento_enviado IS TRUE
          AND (pagamento_feito IS NOT TRUE OR data_pagamento IS NULL)
          AND hora_link_gerado IS NOT NULL 
          AND hora_link_gerado >= _start_ts 
          AND hora_link_gerado <= _end_ts
          AND (_cdt_code IS NULL OR 'ibirite001' = _cdt_code)
        THEN valor_inadimplente ELSE 0 END
    ) / 100.0, 0) AS valor_cobrado,
    -- Valor pago
    COALESCE(SUM(
      CASE 
        WHEN pagamento_feito IS TRUE
          AND data_pagamento IS NOT NULL
          AND data_pagamento >= _start_ts 
          AND data_pagamento <= _end_ts
          AND (_cdt_code IS NULL OR 'ibirite001' = _cdt_code)
        THEN valor_inadimplente ELSE 0 END
    ) / 100.0, 0) AS valor_pago
  FROM public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard
  GROUP BY 
    CASE 
      WHEN regua IS NOT NULL THEN regua
      WHEN valor_inadimplente = 3090 THEN '1'
      WHEN valor_inadimplente = 6180 THEN '2'
      ELSE regua
    END
  HAVING 
    COALESCE(SUM(
      CASE 
        WHEN link_pagamento_enviado IS TRUE
          AND (pagamento_feito IS NOT TRUE OR data_pagamento IS NULL)
          AND hora_link_gerado IS NOT NULL 
          AND hora_link_gerado >= _start_ts 
          AND hora_link_gerado <= _end_ts
          AND (_cdt_code IS NULL OR 'ibirite001' = _cdt_code)
        THEN valor_inadimplente ELSE 0 END
    ), 0) > 0
    OR
    COALESCE(SUM(
      CASE 
        WHEN pagamento_feito IS TRUE
          AND data_pagamento IS NOT NULL
          AND data_pagamento >= _start_ts 
          AND data_pagamento <= _end_ts
          AND (_cdt_code IS NULL OR 'ibirite001' = _cdt_code)
        THEN valor_inadimplente ELSE 0 END
    ), 0) > 0
  ORDER BY 
    CASE 
      WHEN CASE 
        WHEN regua IS NOT NULL THEN regua
        WHEN valor_inadimplente = 3090 THEN '1'
        WHEN valor_inadimplente = 6180 THEN '2'
        ELSE regua
      END IS NULL THEN 99
      ELSE 
        CASE 
          WHEN CASE 
            WHEN regua IS NOT NULL THEN regua
            WHEN valor_inadimplente = 3090 THEN '1'
            WHEN valor_inadimplente = 6180 THEN '2'
            ELSE regua
          END ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN 
            CAST(CASE 
              WHEN regua IS NOT NULL THEN regua
              WHEN valor_inadimplente = 3090 THEN '1'
              WHEN valor_inadimplente = 6180 THEN '2'
              ELSE regua
            END AS INTEGER)
          ELSE 99
        END
    END;
$function$

args: p_unit_id uuid, p_start timestamp with time zone, p_end timestamp with time zone

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_cobranca_by_regua(p_unit_id uuid, p_start timestamp with time zone, p_end timestamp with time zone)
 RETURNS TABLE(regua text, valor_cobrado numeric, valor_pago numeric)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  WITH
    pagas_no_periodo AS (
      SELECT DISTINCT p.matricula
      FROM public.pagamentos p
      WHERE p.data_pagamento >= p_start
        AND p.data_pagamento <= p_end
        AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR p.unit_id = p_unit_id)
    ),
    cobrado AS (
      SELECT
        COALESCE(c.regua, 'Sem Régua') AS regua,
        SUM(c.valor_inadimplente)::numeric / 100.0 AS valor
      FROM public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard c
      WHERE c.link_pagamento_enviado = true
        AND c.hora_link_gerado >= p_start
        AND c.hora_link_gerado <= p_end
        AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR c.unit_id = p_unit_id)
        AND c.pagamento_feito = false
        AND c.matricula NOT IN (SELECT matricula FROM pagas_no_periodo WHERE matricula IS NOT NULL)
      GROUP BY COALESCE(c.regua, 'Sem Régua')
    ),
    pago AS (
      SELECT
        COALESCE(p.regua, 'Sem Régua') AS regua,
        SUM(p.valor)::numeric / 100.0 AS valor
      FROM public.pagamentos p
      WHERE p.data_pagamento >= p_start
        AND p.data_pagamento <= p_end
        AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR p.unit_id = p_unit_id)
      GROUP BY COALESCE(p.regua, 'Sem Régua')
    )
  SELECT
    COALESCE(co.regua, pa.regua) AS regua,
    COALESCE(co.valor, 0)        AS valor_cobrado,
    COALESCE(pa.valor, 0)        AS valor_pago
  FROM cobrado co
  FULL OUTER JOIN pago pa ON pa.regua = co.regua
$function$

args: p_unit_id uuid, p_start timestamp with time zone, p_end timestamp with time zone
definicao:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_cobranca_kpis(p_unit_id uuid, p_start timestamp with time zone, p_end timestamp with time zone)
 RETURNS TABLE(pagamentos_realizados bigint, valores_recebidos numeric, pagamentos_dia bigint, valores_recebidos_dia numeric, pagamentos_ontem bigint, valores_recebidos_ontem numeric, clientes_contactados bigint, interacoes bigint, links_enviados bigint, valores_links_aberto numeric, cobrancas_hoje bigint)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  WITH
    today_brt AS (
      SELECT (now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date AS d
    ),
    pag_periodo AS (
      SELECT p.valor
      FROM public.pagamentos p
      WHERE p.data_pagamento >= p_start
        AND p.data_pagamento <= p_end
        AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR p.unit_id = p_unit_id)
    ),
    pag_today AS (
      SELECT p.valor
      FROM public.pagamentos p, today_brt t
      WHERE (p.data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date = t.d
        AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR p.unit_id = p_unit_id)
    ),
    pag_yesterday AS (
      SELECT p.valor
      FROM public.pagamentos p, today_brt t
      WHERE (p.data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date = t.d - 1
        AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR p.unit_id = p_unit_id)
    ),
    cnt_contactados AS (
      SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
      FROM public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard c
      WHERE c.data_ultimo_disparo >= p_start::date
        AND c.data_ultimo_disparo <= p_end::date
        AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR c.unit_id = p_unit_id)
    ),
    cnt_interacoes AS (
      SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
      FROM public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard c
      WHERE c.data_ultima_mensagem_temp >= p_start
        AND c.data_ultima_mensagem_temp <= p_end
        AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR c.unit_id = p_unit_id)
    ),
    links AS (
      SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS n,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN c.pagamento_feito = false THEN c.valor_inadimplente ELSE 0 END), 0)::numeric / 100.0 AS aberto
      FROM public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard c
      WHERE c.link_pagamento_enviado = true
        AND c.hora_link_gerado >= p_start
        AND c.hora_link_gerado <= p_end
        AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR c.unit_id = p_unit_id)
    ),
    cnt_cobr_hoje AS (
      SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
      FROM public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard c, today_brt t
      WHERE c.data_ultimo_disparo = t.d
        AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR c.unit_id = p_unit_id)
    )
  SELECT
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pag_periodo)::bigint,
    COALESCE((SELECT SUM(valor) FROM pag_periodo), 0)::numeric / 100.0,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pag_today)::bigint,
    COALESCE((SELECT SUM(valor) FROM pag_today), 0)::numeric / 100.0,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pag_yesterday)::bigint,
    COALESCE((SELECT SUM(valor) FROM pag_yesterday), 0)::numeric / 100.0,
    (SELECT n FROM cnt_contactados)::bigint,
    (SELECT n FROM cnt_interacoes)::bigint,
    (SELECT n FROM links)::bigint,
    (SELECT aberto FROM links),
    (SELECT n FROM cnt_cobr_hoje)::bigint
$function$

args: _start_ts timestamp with time zone, _end_ts timestamp with time zone, _cdt_code text
definicao:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_cobranca_metrics(_start_ts timestamp with time zone, _end_ts timestamp with time zone, _cdt_code text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(total_contactados integer, interacoes integer, links_enviados integer, pagamentos_realizados integer, valores_em_aberto numeric, valores_recebidos numeric)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  SELECT
    -- Total contactados: clientes que tiveram disparo no período OU pagamento no período
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
      WHEN (
        (data_ultimo_disparo IS NOT NULL 
         AND data_ultimo_disparo::date >= (_start_ts AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date 
         AND data_ultimo_disparo::date <= (_end_ts AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date)
        OR (pagamento_feito IS TRUE 
            AND data_pagamento IS NOT NULL 
            AND data_pagamento >= _start_ts 
            AND data_pagamento <= _end_ts)
      ) AND (_cdt_code IS NULL OR 'ibirite001' = _cdt_code)
      THEN id 
    END)::int AS total_contactados,
    
    -- Interações: clientes que responderam E data_ultima_mensagem_temp no período
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE respondeu IS TRUE
        AND data_ultima_mensagem_temp IS NOT NULL
        AND data_ultima_mensagem_temp >= _start_ts
        AND data_ultima_mensagem_temp <= _end_ts
        AND (_cdt_code IS NULL OR 'ibirite001' = _cdt_code)
    )::int AS interacoes,
    
    -- Links enviados: usando hora_link_gerado (timestamp preciso) no horário de Brasília
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE hora_link_gerado IS NOT NULL
        AND hora_link_gerado >= _start_ts
        AND hora_link_gerado <= _end_ts
        AND link_pagamento_enviado IS TRUE
        AND (_cdt_code IS NULL OR 'ibirite001' = _cdt_code)
    )::int AS links_enviados,
    
    -- Pagamentos: continua usando data_pagamento
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE pagamento_feito IS TRUE
        AND data_pagamento IS NOT NULL
        AND data_pagamento >= _start_ts 
        AND data_pagamento <= _end_ts
        AND (_cdt_code IS NULL OR 'ibirite001' = _cdt_code)
    )::int AS pagamentos_realizados,
    
    -- Valores em aberto: links gerados no período (usando hora_link_gerado) sem pagamento
    COALESCE(SUM(
      CASE 
        WHEN hora_link_gerado IS NOT NULL
          AND hora_link_gerado >= _start_ts
          AND hora_link_gerado <= _end_ts
          AND link_pagamento_enviado IS TRUE
          AND (pagamento_feito IS NOT TRUE OR data_pagamento IS NULL)
          AND (_cdt_code IS NULL OR 'ibirite001' = _cdt_code)
        THEN valor_inadimplente ELSE 0 END
    ) / 100.0, 0)::numeric AS valores_em_aberto,
    
    -- Valores recebidos: continua usando data_pagamento
    COALESCE(SUM(
      CASE 
        WHEN pagamento_feito IS TRUE
          AND data_pagamento IS NOT NULL
          AND data_pagamento >= _start_ts 
          AND data_pagamento <= _end_ts
          AND (_cdt_code IS NULL OR 'ibirite001' = _cdt_code)
        THEN valor_inadimplente ELSE 0 END
    ) / 100.0, 0)::numeric AS valores_recebidos
  FROM public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_daily_payment_counts(_start_ts timestamp with time zone, _end_ts timestamp with time zone, _cdt_code text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(payment_date date, client_count integer)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  SELECT
    (data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date AS payment_date,
    COUNT(*)::integer AS client_count
  FROM public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_open_payment_links(p_unit_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid, p_days integer DEFAULT 7)
 RETURNS TABLE(matricula text, valor numeric, regua text, created_at timestamp with time zone, correlation_id text, unit_id uuid)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (l.matricula)
    l.matricula,
    l.valor,
    l.regua,
    l.created_at,
    l.correlation_id,
    l.unit_id
  FROM public.links_pagamentos_gerados l
  WHERE l.status = 'pending'
    AND l.cancelado_at IS NULL
    AND l.created_at >= now() - (p_days || ' days')::interval
    AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR l.unit_id = p_unit_id)
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM public.pagamentos p
      WHERE p.correlation_id = l.correlation_id
        AND p.reembolso_realizado IS NOT TRUE
    )
  ORDER BY l.matricula, l.created_at DESC;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_phone_pending_debts(p_whatsapp text, p_unit_id uuid)
 RETURNS TABLE(matricula text, name text, valor_inadimplente numeric, regua text, unit_id uuid, has_active_link boolean, link_pagamento text)
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$
  SELECT
    ccs.matricula,
    ccs.name,
    ccs.valor_inadimplente,
    ccs.regua,
    ccs.unit_id,
    EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM links_pagamentos_gerados l
      WHERE l.matricula    = ccs.matricula
        AND l.unit_id      = ccs.unit_id
        AND l.cancelado_at IS NULL
        AND (
          (l.expires_at IS NOT NULL AND l.expires_at > NOW())
          OR
          (l.expires_at IS NULL AND l.data_link_gerado > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day')
        )
    ) AS has_active_link,
    (
      SELECT l.link_pagamento FROM links_pagamentos_gerados l
      WHERE l.matricula    = ccs.matricula
        AND l.unit_id      = ccs.unit_id
        AND l.cancelado_at IS NULL
        AND (
          (l.expires_at IS NOT NULL AND l.expires_at > NOW())
          OR
          (l.expires_at IS NULL AND l.data_link_gerado > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day')
        )
      ORDER BY l.created_at DESC
      LIMIT 1
    ) AS link_pagamento
  FROM clientes_cobranca_setembro ccs
  WHERE ccs.whatsapp        = p_whatsapp
    AND ccs.unit_id         = p_unit_id
    AND ccs.pagamento_feito = false
  ORDER BY ccs.valor_inadimplente DESC;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_regua_totals(_start_ts text, _end_ts text)
 RETURNS TABLE(regua_nr numeric, regua_1 numeric, regua_2 numeric, demais_reguas numeric, count_nr bigint, count_1 bigint, count_2 bigint, count_demais bigint)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  WITH classified AS (
    SELECT
      valor,
      CASE
        WHEN UPPER(TRIM(regua)) = 'NR' OR regua IS NULL OR TRIM(regua) = '' THEN 'NR'
        WHEN TRIM(regua) = '1' THEN '1'
        WHEN TRIM(regua) = '2' THEN '2'
        ELSE 'demais'
      END AS bucket
    FROM public.pagamentos
    WHERE data_pagamento >= _start_ts::timestamptz
      AND data_pagamento <= _end_ts::timestamptz
      AND reembolso_realizado IS NOT TRUE
  )
  SELECT
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN bucket = 'NR'     THEN valor ELSE 0 END) / 100.0, 0) AS regua_nr,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN bucket = '1'      THEN valor ELSE 0 END) / 100.0, 0) AS regua_1,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN bucket = '2'      THEN valor ELSE 0 END) / 100.0, 0) AS regua_2,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN bucket = 'demais' THEN valor ELSE 0 END) / 100.0, 0) AS demais_reguas,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE bucket = 'NR')     AS count_nr,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE bucket = '1')      AS count_1,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE bucket = '2')      AS count_2,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE bucket = 'demais') AS count_demais
  FROM classified;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_unit_details(unit_code_param text)
 RETURNS TABLE(id uuid, name text, code text, created_at timestamp with time zone, updated_at timestamp with time zone, user_permissions text[])
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  current_user_id UUID;
  target_unit_id UUID;
  is_admin BOOLEAN;
BEGIN
  -- Obter o ID do usuário autenticado
  current_user_id := auth.uid();
  
  -- Se não há usuário autenticado, retornar vazio
  IF current_user_id IS NULL THEN
    RETURN;
  END IF;
  
  -- Buscar o ID da unidade pelo código
  SELECT u.id INTO target_unit_id
  FROM public.units u
  WHERE u.code = unit_code_param;
  
  -- Se a unidade não existe, retornar vazio
  IF target_unit_id IS NULL THEN
    RETURN;
  END IF;
  
  -- Verificar se o usuário é admin
  SELECT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM public.user_roles 
    WHERE user_id = current_user_id 
    AND role = 'admin'
  ) INTO is_admin;
  
  -- Se é admin, retornar a unidade com todas as permissões
  IF is_admin THEN
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT 
      u.id,
      u.name,
      u.code,
      u.created_at,
      u.updated_at,
      ARRAY['admin', 'dashboard', 'pagamentos', 'cobranca_time', 'whatsapp_errado', 'dashboard_vendas', 'vendas']::TEXT[] AS user_permissions
    FROM public.units u
    WHERE u.id = target_unit_id;
  ELSE
    -- Para usuários não-admin, verificar se tem acesso e retornar com permissões
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT 
      u.id,
      u.name,
      u.code,
      u.created_at,
      u.updated_at,
      ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT uup.permission::TEXT ORDER BY uup.permission::TEXT) AS user_permissions
    FROM public.units u
    INNER JOIN public.user_unit_permissions uup ON uup.unit_id = u.id
    WHERE u.id = target_unit_id
    AND uup.user_id = current_user_id
    AND uup.is_active = TRUE
    GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.code, u.created_at, u.updated_at;
  END IF;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_user_accessible_units()
 RETURNS TABLE(unit_id uuid, unit_name text, unit_code text, permissions text[])
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  current_user_id UUID;
  is_admin BOOLEAN;
BEGIN
  -- Obter o ID do usuário autenticado
  current_user_id := auth.uid();
  
  -- Se não há usuário autenticado, retornar vazio
  IF current_user_id IS NULL THEN
    RETURN;
  END IF;
  
  -- Verificar se o usuário é admin
  SELECT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM public.user_roles 
    WHERE user_id = current_user_id 
    AND role = 'admin'
  ) INTO is_admin;
  
  -- Se é admin, retornar todas as unidades com todas as permissões
  IF is_admin THEN
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT 
      u.id AS unit_id,
      u.name AS unit_name,
      u.code AS unit_code,
      ARRAY['admin', 'dashboard', 'pagamentos', 'cobranca_time', 'whatsapp_errado', 'dashboard_vendas', 'vendas']::TEXT[] AS permissions
    FROM public.units u
    ORDER BY u.name ASC;
  ELSE
    -- Para usuários não-admin, retornar apenas as unidades com permissões ativas
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT 
      u.id AS unit_id,
      u.name AS unit_name,
      u.code AS unit_code,
      ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT uup.permission::TEXT ORDER BY uup.permission::TEXT) AS permissions
    FROM public.units u
    INNER JOIN public.user_unit_permissions uup ON uup.unit_id = u.id
    WHERE uup.user_id = current_user_id
    AND uup.is_active = TRUE
    GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.code
    ORDER BY u.name ASC;
  END IF;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.has_unit_permission(_user_id uuid, _unit_code text, _permission permission_type)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
BEGIN
  -- Check if user is admin (has access to everything)
  IF has_role(_user_id, 'admin'::app_role) THEN
    RETURN true;
  END IF;
  
  -- Check specific permission for the unit
  RETURN EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM public.user_unit_permissions uup
    JOIN public.units u ON u.id = uup.unit_id
    WHERE uup.user_id = _user_id
      AND u.code = _unit_code
      AND uup.permission = _permission
      AND uup.is_active = true
  );
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.limpar_links_pagamento_expirados()
 RETURNS integer
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_setembro integer := 0;
  v_dashboard integer := 0;
BEGIN
  WITH dead AS (
    SELECT link_pagamento
    FROM public.links_pagamentos_gerados
    WHERE link_pagamento IS NOT NULL
      AND (
        cancelado_at IS NOT NULL
        OR status IN ('expired','cancelled','paid')
        OR (expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at < now())
      )
  ), upd AS (
    UPDATE public.clientes_cobranca_setembro c
    SET link_pagamento = NULL,
        correlation_id = NULL
    FROM dead d
    WHERE c.link_pagamento = d.link_pagamento
    RETURNING 1
  )
  SELECT count(*) INTO v_setembro FROM upd;

  WITH dead AS (
    SELECT link_pagamento
    FROM public.links_pagamentos_gerados
    WHERE link_pagamento IS NOT NULL
      AND (
        cancelado_at IS NOT NULL
        OR status IN ('expired','cancelled','paid')
        OR (expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at < now())
      )
  ), upd AS (
    UPDATE public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard c
    SET link_pagamento = NULL,
        correlation_id = NULL
    FROM dead d
    WHERE c.link_pagamento = d.link_pagamento
    RETURNING 1
  )
  SELECT count(*) INTO v_dashboard FROM upd;

  INSERT INTO public.log_limpeza_links (registros_atualizados, detalhe)
  VALUES (
    v_setembro + v_dashboard,
    jsonb_build_object('setembro', v_setembro, 'dashboard', v_dashboard)
  );

  RETURN v_setembro + v_dashboard;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.link_payout_charges(p_payout_id uuid)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_unit_id UUID;
  v_completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ;
  v_periodo_inicio TIMESTAMPTZ;
  v_linked_count INT := 0;
  -- Pricing Abacate Pay (fixo): R$ 0,80 por charge PIX recebida.
  -- Fee de R$ 0,80 do saque em si vive em payouts.platform_fee_cents.
  c_taxa_charge_cents CONSTANT BIGINT := 80;
BEGIN
  SELECT unit_id, COALESCE(completed_at, updated_at, created_at)
    INTO v_unit_id, v_completed_at
    FROM public.payouts
   WHERE id = p_payout_id
     AND status = 'COMPLETE'
     AND platform = 'abacate';

  IF v_unit_id IS NULL THEN
    RETURN jsonb_build_object(
      'ok', false,
      'reason', 'payout_not_found_or_not_complete',
      'payout_id', p_payout_id
    );
  END IF;

  SELECT COALESCE(completed_at, updated_at, created_at)
    INTO v_periodo_inicio
    FROM public.payouts
   WHERE unit_id = v_unit_id
     AND platform = 'abacate'
     AND status = 'COMPLETE'
     AND id <> p_payout_id
     AND COALESCE(completed_at, updated_at, created_at) < v_completed_at
   ORDER BY COALESCE(completed_at, updated_at, created_at) DESC
   LIMIT 1;

  IF v_periodo_inicio IS NULL THEN
    v_periodo_inicio := 'epoch'::TIMESTAMPTZ;
  END IF;

  WITH candidatos AS (
    SELECT p.id AS pagamento_id, p.valor AS valor_bruto_cents
      FROM public.pagamentos p
      JOIN public.links_pagamentos_gerados l
        ON l.correlation_id = p.correlation_id
     WHERE p.unit_id = v_unit_id
       AND l.plataforma_pagamento_utilizada = 'abacate'
       AND p.data_pagamento >  v_periodo_inicio
       AND p.data_pagamento <= v_completed_at
  )
  INSERT INTO public.payout_pagamentos (payout_id, pagamento_id, valor_bruto_cents, valor_taxa_cents)
  SELECT p_payout_id, c.pagamento_id, c.valor_bruto_cents, c_taxa_charge_cents
    FROM candidatos c
  ON CONFLICT (pagamento_id) DO NOTHING;

  GET DIAGNOSTICS v_linked_count = ROW_COUNT;

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    'ok', true,
    'payout_id', p_payout_id,
    'unit_id', v_unit_id,
    'periodo_inicio', v_periodo_inicio,
    'periodo_fim', v_completed_at,
    'linked_count', v_linked_count
  );
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.motor_v2_adimplentes_finalize(p_batch_id uuid, p_unit_id uuid, p_file_name text, p_file_id text, p_rows_new integer, p_rows_updated integer)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
declare
  v_removed int := 0;
  v_total int := coalesce(p_rows_new,0) + coalesce(p_rows_updated,0);
begin
  update adimplentes_base
     set bi_atual = false, updated_at = now()
   where unit_id = p_unit_id
     and bi_atual = true
     and import_batch_id is distinct from p_batch_id;
  get diagnostics v_removed = row_count;

  insert into adimplentes_import_log
    (batch_id, unit_id, file_name, file_id_drive,
     rows_total, rows_new, rows_updated, rows_removed, imported_at)
  values
    (p_batch_id, p_unit_id, p_file_name, p_file_id,
     v_total, coalesce(p_rows_new,0), coalesce(p_rows_updated,0), v_removed, now());

  return jsonb_build_object(
    'unit_id', p_unit_id,
    'rows_total', v_total,
    'rows_new', coalesce(p_rows_new,0),
    'rows_updated', coalesce(p_rows_updated,0),
    'rows_removed', v_removed);
end $function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.motor_v2_adimplentes_upsert(p_batch_id uuid, p_records jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
declare
  v_new int := 0; v_updated int := 0;
begin
  with src as (
    select distinct on (unit_id, matricula)
      unit_id, matricula, telefone, nome, status, raw_data
    from (
      select
        (r->>'unit_id')::uuid       as unit_id,
        r->>'matricula'             as matricula,
        nullif(r->>'telefone','')   as telefone,
        nullif(r->>'nome','')       as nome,
        nullif(r->>'status','')     as status,
        coalesce(r->'raw_data','{}'::jsonb) as raw_data
      from jsonb_array_elements(coalesce(p_records,'[]'::jsonb)) as r
    ) q
    where unit_id is not null
      and nullif(matricula,'') is not null
      and telefone is not null
    order by unit_id, matricula
  ),
  up as (
    insert into adimplentes_base
      (unit_id, matricula, telefone, nome, status, raw_data,
       bi_atual, import_batch_id, imported_at, updated_at)
    select unit_id, matricula, telefone, nome, status, raw_data,
           true, p_batch_id, now(), now()
    from src
    on conflict (unit_id, matricula) do update set
      telefone        = excluded.telefone,
      nome            = excluded.nome,
      status          = excluded.status,
      raw_data        = excluded.raw_data,
      bi_atual        = true,
      import_batch_id = p_batch_id,
      imported_at     = now(),
      updated_at      = now()
    returning (xmax = 0) as inserted
  )
  select count(*) filter (where inserted),
         count(*) filter (where not inserted)
    into v_new, v_updated
  from up;

  return jsonb_build_object('new', coalesce(v_new,0), 'updated', coalesce(v_updated,0));
end $function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.motor_v2_avancar_dia(p_target_date date, p_unit_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid)
 RETURNS integer
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_count INT;
BEGIN
  UPDATE cliente_cadencia
  SET
    dia_ciclo         = dia_ciclo + 1,
    last_advance_date = p_target_date,
    updated_at        = now()
  WHERE status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PAUSED_REGUA_MORTA')
    AND (last_advance_date IS NULL OR last_advance_date < p_target_date)
    AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR unit_id = p_unit_id);

  GET DIAGNOSTICS v_count = ROW_COUNT;
  RETURN v_count;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.motor_v2_finalizar_dia22(p_target_date date, p_unit_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid)
 RETURNS integer
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_count INT;
BEGIN
  WITH finalized AS (
    UPDATE cliente_cadencia
    SET
      status        = 'FINALIZADO',
      finalizado_at = now(),
      updated_at    = now()
    WHERE status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PAUSED_REGUA_MORTA')
      AND dia_ciclo > 21
      AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR unit_id = p_unit_id)
    RETURNING id, unit_id, matricula, telefone, nome
  )
  INSERT INTO fila_humana (
    unit_id, matricula, telefone, nome,
    cliente_cadencia_id, motivo, motivo_detalhe
  )
  SELECT
    unit_id, matricula, telefone, nome,
    id, 'FINALIZOU_21D',
    'Cliente concluiu ciclo de 21 dias sem pagar (' || p_target_date::text || ')'
  FROM finalized;

  GET DIAGNOSTICS v_count = ROW_COUNT;
  RETURN v_count;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.motor_v2_get_disparos(p_unit_id uuid, p_slot_index integer)
 RETURNS TABLE(matricula text, telefone text, primeiro_nome text, valor_brl text, regua text, dia_ciclo integer, slot_index integer, template_name text, meta_template_id text, phone_number_id text, waba_id text, waba_token text, whatsapp_payload jsonb)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
#variable_conflict use_column
declare
  v_phone text; v_waba text; v_token text; v_reguas text[];
begin
  -- 0. disparador ativo da unidade (número que o motor usa + token/waba)
  select d.numero_telefone, d.waba_id, d.waba_token
    into v_phone, v_waba, v_token
  from disparadores_whatsapp d
  where d.unit_id = p_unit_id and d.ativo = true and d.waba_id is not null
  order by d.id limit 1;
  if v_waba is null then return; end if;

  -- gate: réguas vivas pela saúde do número (fallback NR)
  select coalesce(gs.reguas_efetivas, array['NR']::text[]) into v_reguas
  from gate_state gs where gs.unit_id = p_unit_id;
  if v_reguas is null then v_reguas := array['NR']::text[]; end if;

  -- 1. SEED: inadimplente sem cadência ativa entra no dia 1
  insert into cliente_cadencia(matricula,unit_id,telefone,nome,regua,dia_ciclo,ciclo_numero,
                               entrou_em,status,last_advance_date,created_at,updated_at)
  select c.matricula, c.unit_id, c.whatsapp, c.name,
         case when upper(trim(c.regua)) = 'NR' then 'NR' else 'R' || trim(c.regua) end,
         1, 1, current_date, 'ACTIVE', current_date, now(), now()
  from clientes_cobranca_setembro c
  where c.unit_id = p_unit_id
    and coalesce(c.pagamento_feito,false) = false
    and coalesce(c.bloqueio_disparos,false) = false
    and (upper(trim(c.regua)) = 'NR' or trim(c.regua) in ('1','2','3','4','5','6'))
    and not exists (
      select 1 from pagamentos p
      where p.unit_id = c.unit_id and p.matricula = c.matricula
        and (p.created_at at time zone 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date = (now() at time zone 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date)
    and not exists (
      select 1 from cliente_cadencia cc
      where cc.unit_id = c.unit_id and cc.matricula = c.matricula
        and cc.status in ('ACTIVE','PAUSED_BLOQUEADO','PAUSED_REGUA_MORTA'));

  -- 2. AVANÇO (só no 1º slot do dia): quem já passou de um dia anterior +1; finaliza >21
  if p_slot_index = 1 then
    update cliente_cadencia set dia_ciclo = dia_ciclo + 1, last_advance_date = current_date, updated_at = now()
      where unit_id = p_unit_id and status = 'ACTIVE' and last_advance_date < current_date;
    update cliente_cadencia set status = 'FINALIZADO', finalizado_at = now(), updated_at = now()
      where unit_id = p_unit_id and status = 'ACTIVE' and dia_ciclo > 21;
  end if;

  -- 3. SAÍDAS: pagou / bloqueado
  update cliente_cadencia cc set status = 'PAGO', pago_at = now(), updated_at = now()
    from clientes_cobranca_setembro c
    where cc.unit_id = p_unit_id and cc.matricula = c.matricula and cc.unit_id = c.unit_id
      and cc.status = 'ACTIVE' and coalesce(c.pagamento_feito,false) = true;
  -- cinto+suspensório: quem pagou HOJE (pagamentos), mesmo se o flag do BI atrasar
  update cliente_cadencia cc set status = 'PAGO', pago_at = now(), updated_at = now()
    where cc.unit_id = p_unit_id and cc.status = 'ACTIVE'
      and exists (
        select 1 from pagamentos p
        where p.unit_id = cc.unit_id and p.matricula = cc.matricula
          and (p.created_at at time zone 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date = (now() at time zone 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date);
  update cliente_cadencia cc set status = 'PAUSED_BLOQUEADO', paused_at = now(), updated_at = now()
    from clientes_cobranca_setembro c
    where cc.unit_id = p_unit_id and cc.matricula = c.matricula and cc.unit_id = c.unit_id
      and cc.status = 'ACTIVE' and coalesce(c.bloqueio_disparos,false) = true;

  -- 4. BATCH do slot: ativo × calendar(regua,dia,slot != PAUSA) × gate × revalida cliente
  return query
  select
    cc.matricula,
    cc.telefone,
    initcap(split_part(coalesce(cc.nome,''),' ',1)) as primeiro_nome,
    translate(to_char(round(coalesce(c.valor_inadimplente,0)/100.0,2),'FM999999990.00'),'.',',') as valor_brl,
    cc.regua, cc.dia_ciclo, p_slot_index as slot_index,
    pt.template_name, pt.meta_template_id,
    v_phone as phone_number_id, v_waba as waba_id, v_token as waba_token,
    jsonb_build_object(
      'messaging_product','whatsapp',
      'to', case when regexp_replace(cc.telefone,'\D','','g') like '55%'
                 then regexp_replace(cc.telefone,'\D','','g')
                 else '55' || regexp_replace(cc.telefone,'\D','','g') end,
      'type','template',
      'template', jsonb_build_object(
        'name', pt.template_name,
        'language', jsonb_build_object('code','pt_BR'),
        'components', motor_v2_build_components(
          ti.components,
          initcap(split_part(coalesce(cc.nome,''),' ',1)),
          translate(to_char(round(coalesce(c.valor_inadimplente,0)/100.0,2),'FM999999990.00'),'.',','),
          cc.matricula,
          cc.matricula)
      )
    ) as whatsapp_payload
  from cliente_cadencia cc
  join clientes_cobranca_setembro c
    on c.unit_id = cc.unit_id and c.matricula = cc.matricula
  join cadence_calendar cal
    on cal.regua = cc.regua and cal.dia_ciclo = cc.dia_ciclo
   and cal.slot_index = p_slot_index and cal.action_type not in ('PAUSA','NONE')
  cross join lateral motor_v2_pick_template(v_waba, cc.regua, cc.dia_ciclo, cc.matricula) pt
  left join template_inventory ti on ti.waba_id = v_waba and ti.template_name = pt.template_name
  where cc.unit_id = p_unit_id
    and cc.status = 'ACTIVE'
    and cc.regua = any(v_reguas)
    and coalesce(c.pagamento_feito,false) = false
    and coalesce(c.bloqueio_disparos,false) = false
    and c.disparos_pausados_ate is null
    and not exists (
      select 1 from pagamentos p
      where p.unit_id = cc.unit_id and p.matricula = cc.matricula
        and (p.created_at at time zone 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date = (now() at time zone 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date)
    and cc.telefone is not null
    and pt.template_name is not null;
end $function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.motor_v2_pick_template(p_waba_id text, p_regua text, p_dia_ciclo integer DEFAULT NULL::integer)
 RETURNS TABLE(template_name text, meta_template_id text, pool_used text, dia_resolvido integer)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
declare
  v_regua text := lower(p_regua);
  v_pool  text;
  v_dia   int;
begin
  -- ---------- Sabado / Fechamento (broadcast, fora do ciclo) ----------
  if p_dia_ciclo is null then
    v_pool := v_regua || '_sabado';
    return query
      select ti.template_name, ti.meta_template_id, v_pool, null::int
      from template_inventory ti
      where ti.waba_id = p_waba_id
        and ti.status = 'APPROVED'
        and ti.category = 'UTILITY'
        and ti.paused_by_sentinel = false
        and ti.template_name ~ ('^' || v_regua || '_sabado_v[0-9]')
      order by random()
      limit 1;
    return;
  end if;

  -- ---------- Cobranca: resolve o dia do pool (exato ou maior <= dia_ciclo) ----------
  select max(d.dia) into v_dia
  from (
    select ((regexp_match(
              ti.template_name,
              '^' || v_regua || '_dia([0-9]+)_v[0-9]'))[1])::int as dia
    from template_inventory ti
    where ti.waba_id = p_waba_id
      and ti.status = 'APPROVED'
      and ti.category = 'UTILITY'
      and ti.paused_by_sentinel = false
      and ti.template_name ~ ('^' || v_regua || '_dia[0-9]+_v[0-9]')
  ) d
  where d.dia is not null
    and d.dia <= p_dia_ciclo;

  if v_dia is null then
    return; -- nenhum template elegivel: n8n trata como falha sem retry
  end if;

  v_pool := v_regua || '_dia' || v_dia;
  return query
    select ti.template_name, ti.meta_template_id, v_pool, v_dia
    from template_inventory ti
    where ti.waba_id = p_waba_id
      and ti.status = 'APPROVED'
      and ti.category = 'UTILITY'
      and ti.paused_by_sentinel = false
      and ti.template_name ~ ('^' || v_regua || '_dia' || v_dia || '_v[0-9]')
    order by random()
    limit 1;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.motor_v2_recalc_gate(p_unit_id uuid)
 RETURNS gate_state
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_worst_color    TEXT;
  v_worst_phone_id TEXT;
  v_override_color TEXT;
  v_efetivo_color  TEXT;
  v_reguas_base    TEXT[];
  v_reguas_cap     TEXT[];
  v_reguas_efet    TEXT[];
  v_ratio          NUMERIC(5,2);
  v_result         gate_state;
BEGIN
  -- 1. Pior cor entre os números da unidade.
  --    Para cada phone ativo, pega o snapshot mais recente em phone_health.
  WITH active_phones AS (
    SELECT numero_telefone AS phone_number_id
    FROM disparadores_whatsapp
    WHERE unit_id = p_unit_id AND ativo = true
  ),
  latest_health AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (ph.phone_number_id)
      ph.phone_number_id,
      COALESCE(ph.quality_rating, 'UNKNOWN') AS color,
      ph.observed_at
    FROM phone_health ph
    INNER JOIN active_phones ap ON ap.phone_number_id = ph.phone_number_id
    ORDER BY ph.phone_number_id, ph.observed_at DESC
  ),
  ranked AS (
    SELECT
      phone_number_id,
      color,
      CASE color
        WHEN 'RED'     THEN 3
        WHEN 'YELLOW'  THEN 2
        WHEN 'GREEN'   THEN 1
        ELSE                 0  -- UNKNOWN
      END AS rank
    FROM latest_health
  )
  SELECT color, phone_number_id
    INTO v_worst_color, v_worst_phone_id
  FROM ranked
  ORDER BY rank DESC
  LIMIT 1;

  -- Sem phone_health pra unidade ainda? Assume GREEN (otimista — gate só vira
  -- restritivo quando há sinal concreto de degradação).
  IF v_worst_color IS NULL OR v_worst_color = 'UNKNOWN' THEN
    v_worst_color := 'GREEN';
  END IF;

  -- 2. Override manual?
  SELECT NULLIF(value::text, 'null')::text
    INTO v_override_color
  FROM system_state
  WHERE key = 'motor_v2_gate_override_color';

  -- value vem como '"GREEN"' (JSONB string), strip aspas
  IF v_override_color IS NOT NULL THEN
    v_override_color := TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM v_override_color);
    IF v_override_color NOT IN ('GREEN','YELLOW','RED') THEN
      v_override_color := NULL;
    END IF;
  END IF;

  v_efetivo_color := COALESCE(v_override_color, v_worst_color);

  -- 3. Réguas-base do gate_config + cap do system_state
  SELECT reguas_ativas, relacionamento_ratio
    INTO v_reguas_base, v_ratio
  FROM gate_config
  WHERE health_color = v_efetivo_color;

  SELECT ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(value))
    INTO v_reguas_cap
  FROM system_state
  WHERE key = 'motor_v2_reguas_override';

  -- 4. Intersecção
  IF v_reguas_cap IS NOT NULL AND array_length(v_reguas_cap, 1) > 0 THEN
    v_reguas_efet := ARRAY(
      SELECT unnest(v_reguas_base)
      INTERSECT
      SELECT unnest(v_reguas_cap)
    );
  ELSE
    v_reguas_efet := v_reguas_base;
  END IF;

  -- 5. UPSERT
  INSERT INTO gate_state (
    unit_id, health_color_calc, health_color_override, health_color_efetivo,
    reguas_efetivas, relacionamento_ratio,
    worst_phone_id, worst_phone_color,
    last_evaluated_at, updated_at
  ) VALUES (
    p_unit_id, v_worst_color, v_override_color, v_efetivo_color,
    v_reguas_efet, v_ratio,
    v_worst_phone_id, v_worst_color,
    now(), now()
  )
  ON CONFLICT (unit_id) DO UPDATE SET
    health_color_calc     = EXCLUDED.health_color_calc,
    health_color_override = EXCLUDED.health_color_override,
    health_color_efetivo  = EXCLUDED.health_color_efetivo,
    reguas_efetivas       = EXCLUDED.reguas_efetivas,
    relacionamento_ratio  = EXCLUDED.relacionamento_ratio,
    worst_phone_id        = EXCLUDED.worst_phone_id,
    worst_phone_color     = EXCLUDED.worst_phone_color,
    last_evaluated_at     = EXCLUDED.last_evaluated_at,
    updated_at            = EXCLUDED.updated_at
  RETURNING * INTO v_result;

  RETURN v_result;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.motor_v2_relacionamento_get_disparos(p_unit_id uuid, p_limit integer)
 RETURNS TABLE(matricula text, telefone text, primeiro_nome text, template_name text, meta_template_id text, categoria text, phone_number_id text, waba_id text, waba_token text, chatwoot_inbox_id integer, whatsapp_payload jsonb)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
declare
  v_seg timestamptz := motor_v2_inicio_semana_sp();
  v_phone text; v_waba text; v_token text; v_inbox int;
begin
  if p_limit is null or p_limit <= 0 then return; end if;

  -- Disparador ativo da unidade (número + token + waba + inbox de relacionamento).
  select d.numero_telefone, d.waba_id, d.waba_token, d.chatwoot_inbox_id
    into v_phone, v_waba, v_token, v_inbox
  from disparadores_whatsapp d
  where d.unit_id = p_unit_id and d.ativo = true and d.waba_id is not null
  order by d.id
  limit 1;
  if v_waba is null then return; end if;

  return query
  with cand as (
    select a.id, a.matricula, a.telefone, a.nome
    from adimplentes_base a
    where a.unit_id = p_unit_id
      and a.bi_atual
      and a.telefone is not null
      and not a.relacionamento_opt_out
      and (a.last_relacionamento_at is null or a.last_relacionamento_at < v_seg)
      and not exists (
        select 1 from clientes_cobranca_setembro c
        where c.unit_id = a.unit_id
          and coalesce(c.pagamento_feito, false) = false
          and norm_phone_br(c.whatsapp) = norm_phone_br(a.telefone))
    order by random()
    limit p_limit
    for update skip locked
  ),
  chosen as (
    select cand.id, cand.matricula, cand.telefone,
           initcap(split_part(coalesce(cand.nome, ''), ' ', 1)) as primeiro_nome,
           t.template_name, t.meta_template_id, t.category, t.components
    from cand
    cross join lateral (
      select ti.template_name, ti.meta_template_id, ti.category, ti.components
      from template_inventory ti
      where ti.waba_id = v_waba
        and ti.status = 'APPROVED'
        and ti.paused_by_sentinel = false
        and ti.template_name ~ '^rel_[a-z0-9_]+_v[0-9]'
      order by random()
      limit 1
    ) t
  ),
  upd as (
    update adimplentes_base a
       set last_relacionamento_at = now(),
           last_relacionamento_template = chosen.template_name,
           updated_at = now()
    from chosen
    where a.id = chosen.id
    returning a.id
  )
  select
    chosen.matricula,
    chosen.telefone,
    chosen.primeiro_nome,
    chosen.template_name,
    chosen.meta_template_id,
    chosen.category as categoria,
    v_phone as phone_number_id,
    v_waba as waba_id,
    v_token as waba_token,
    v_inbox as chatwoot_inbox_id,
    jsonb_build_object(
      'messaging_product', 'whatsapp',
      'to', norm_phone_br(chosen.telefone),
      'type', 'template',
      'template', jsonb_build_object(
        'name', chosen.template_name,
        'language', jsonb_build_object('code', 'pt_BR'),
        'components', motor_v2_build_components(
          chosen.components, chosen.primeiro_nome, '', chosen.matricula, chosen.matricula)
      )
    ) as whatsapp_payload
  from chosen;
end $function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.motor_v2_relacionamento_stats(p_unit_id uuid)
 RETURNS TABLE(total_base bigint, elegiveis_semana bigint, contactados_semana bigint, contactados_hoje bigint)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
declare
  v_seg timestamptz := motor_v2_inicio_semana_sp();
  v_hoje timestamptz := (now() at time zone 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date at time zone 'America/Sao_Paulo';
begin
  return query
  select
    count(*) filter (where a.bi_atual and a.telefone is not null),
    count(*) filter (
      where a.bi_atual and a.telefone is not null
        and not a.relacionamento_opt_out
        and (a.last_relacionamento_at is null or a.last_relacionamento_at < v_seg)
        and not exists (
          select 1 from clientes_cobranca_setembro c
          where c.unit_id = a.unit_id
            and coalesce(c.pagamento_feito, false) = false
            and norm_phone_br(c.whatsapp) = norm_phone_br(a.telefone))
    ),
    count(*) filter (where a.last_relacionamento_at >= v_seg),
    count(*) filter (where a.last_relacionamento_at >= v_hoje)
  from adimplentes_base a
  where a.unit_id = p_unit_id;
end $function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.norm_phone_br(p text)
 RETURNS text
 LANGUAGE sql
 IMMUTABLE
AS $function$
  select case
    when p is null then null
    else (
      select case
        when length(n) = 10 then '55' || substr(n, 1, 2) || '9' || substr(n, 3)            -- DDD+8
        when length(n) = 11 and left(n, 2) <> '55' then '55' || n                           -- DDD+9+8
        when length(n) = 12 and left(n, 2) = '55' then '55' || substr(n, 3, 2) || '9' || substr(n, 5)  -- 55+DDD+8 (falta o 9)
        else n
      end
      from (select regexp_replace(p, '\D', '', 'g') as n) d
    )
  end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.picker_select_batch(p_unit_id uuid, p_max_batch_size integer DEFAULT 40, p_lock_minutes integer DEFAULT 10, p_waba_id text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_fase text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(matricula text, template_name text, meta_template_id text, body_text text, whatsapp text, nome text, fase text, dia_ciclo integer, slot integer, pool_size integer, batch_position integer, valor_inadimplente numeric)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_now_time          time := (now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::time(0);
  v_today             date := (now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date;
  v_slot_config       cadence_slot_config%ROWTYPE;
  v_n_eligible        int;
  v_remaining_min     int;
  v_remaining_cycles  int;
  v_batch_size        int;
  v_pool_count        int;
  v_waba_id           text := COALESCE(p_waba_id, '2569101023484644');
  v_cadence_enabled   boolean;
BEGIN
  SELECT (value::text)::boolean INTO v_cadence_enabled
  FROM system_state WHERE key = 'cadence_enabled';
  IF NOT COALESCE(v_cadence_enabled, false) THEN
    RETURN;
  END IF;

  UPDATE clientes_cobranca_setembro
  SET slots_enviados_hoje = 0,
      slots_enviados_hoje_data = v_today
  WHERE unit_id = p_unit_id
    AND cadence_fase IS NOT NULL
    AND (slots_enviados_hoje_data IS NULL OR slots_enviados_hoje_data < v_today);

  FOR v_slot_config IN
    SELECT * FROM cadence_slot_config
    WHERE v_now_time >= janela_inicio AND v_now_time < janela_fim
      AND (p_fase IS NULL OR cadence_slot_config.fase = p_fase)
    ORDER BY fase, dia_ciclo, slot
  LOOP
    SELECT COUNT(*) INTO v_pool_count
    FROM template_inventory ti
    WHERE ti.waba_id = v_waba_id
      AND ti.status = 'APPROVED'
      AND ti.category = 'UTILITY'
      AND ti.template_name LIKE v_slot_config.template_pool_like
      AND COALESCE(ti.paused_by_sentinel, false) = false;

    IF v_pool_count = 0 THEN CONTINUE; END IF;

    SELECT COUNT(*) INTO v_n_eligible
    FROM clientes_cobranca_setembro
    WHERE unit_id = p_unit_id
      AND cadence_fase = v_slot_config.fase
      AND cadence_dia_ciclo = v_slot_config.dia_ciclo
      AND slots_enviados_hoje = v_slot_config.slot - 1
      AND COALESCE(cadence_branch_state, 'normal') = 'normal'
      AND pagamento_feito = false
      AND bloqueio_disparos = false
      AND (disparos_pausados_ate IS NULL OR disparos_pausados_ate <= v_today)
      AND (cadence_proximo_envio_at IS NULL OR cadence_proximo_envio_at <= now());

    IF v_n_eligible = 0 THEN CONTINUE; END IF;

    v_remaining_min := GREATEST(
      EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (v_slot_config.janela_fim - v_now_time))::int / 60,
      1
    );
    v_remaining_cycles := GREATEST(CEIL(v_remaining_min::numeric / 5), 1);
    v_batch_size := LEAST(
      CEIL(v_n_eligible::numeric / v_remaining_cycles)::int,
      p_max_batch_size
    );

    RETURN QUERY
    WITH picked AS (
      SELECT c.matricula
      FROM clientes_cobranca_setembro c
      WHERE c.unit_id = p_unit_id
        AND c.cadence_fase = v_slot_config.fase
        AND c.cadence_dia_ciclo = v_slot_config.dia_ciclo
        AND c.slots_enviados_hoje = v_slot_config.slot - 1
        AND COALESCE(c.cadence_branch_state, 'normal') = 'normal'
        AND c.pagamento_feito = false
        AND c.bloqueio_disparos = false
        AND (c.disparos_pausados_ate IS NULL OR c.disparos_pausados_ate <= v_today)
        AND (c.cadence_proximo_envio_at IS NULL OR c.cadence_proximo_envio_at <= now())
      ORDER BY random()
      LIMIT v_batch_size
      FOR UPDATE OF c SKIP LOCKED
    ),
    locked AS (
      UPDATE clientes_cobranca_setembro c
      SET cadence_proximo_envio_at = now() + interval '40 minutes'
      FROM picked p
      WHERE c.matricula = p.matricula
      RETURNING c.matricula, c.name, c.whatsapp, c.valor_inadimplente
    ),
    chosen_template AS (
      SELECT
        l.matricula,
        l.name,
        l.whatsapp,
        l.valor_inadimplente,
        ti.template_name,
        ti.meta_template_id,
        ti.body_text,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY l.matricula) AS pos
      FROM locked l
      CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
        SELECT t.template_name, t.meta_template_id, t.body_text
        FROM template_inventory t
        WHERE t.waba_id = v_waba_id
          AND t.status = 'APPROVED'
          AND t.category = 'UTILITY'
          AND t.template_name LIKE v_slot_config.template_pool_like
          AND COALESCE(t.paused_by_sentinel, false) = false
          AND (l.matricula IS NULL OR l.matricula IS NOT NULL)
        ORDER BY random()
        LIMIT 1
      ) ti
    )
    SELECT
      ct.matricula::text,
      ct.template_name::text,
      ct.meta_template_id::text,
      ct.body_text::text,
      ct.whatsapp::text,
      ct.name::text,
      v_slot_config.fase,
      v_slot_config.dia_ciclo,
      v_slot_config.slot,
      v_pool_count,
      ct.pos::int,
      ct.valor_inadimplente
    FROM chosen_template ct;
  END LOOP;

  RETURN;
END;
$function$
