CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.record_message_status(p_wa_message_id text, p_status text, p_failure_code text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_failure_reason text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_raw jsonb DEFAULT NULL::jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_updated INT;
  v_ts      TIMESTAMPTZ;
BEGIN
  -- timestamp real do callback Meta (epoch em p_raw.timestamp); fallback now()
  v_ts := COALESCE(
    CASE WHEN p_raw->>'timestamp' ~ '^\d+$'
         THEN to_timestamp((p_raw->>'timestamp')::bigint) END,
    now()
  );

  UPDATE message_log
     SET status            = p_status,
         status_updated_at = now(),
         failure_code      = COALESCE(p_failure_code, failure_code),
         failure_reason    = COALESCE(p_failure_reason, failure_reason),
         delivered_at      = CASE WHEN p_status = 'delivered'
                                  THEN COALESCE(delivered_at, v_ts) ELSE delivered_at END,
         read_at           = CASE WHEN p_status = 'read'
                                  THEN COALESCE(read_at, v_ts) ELSE read_at END,
         failed_at         = CASE WHEN p_status = 'failed'
                                  THEN COALESCE(failed_at, v_ts) ELSE failed_at END,
         conversation_category = COALESCE(
                                  p_raw->'pricing'->>'category',
                                  p_raw->'conversation'->'origin'->>'type',
                                  conversation_category),
         pricing_billable  = COALESCE(
                                  CASE WHEN lower(p_raw->'pricing'->>'billable') IN ('true','false')
                                       THEN (p_raw->'pricing'->>'billable')::boolean END,
                                  pricing_billable),
         pricing_model     = COALESCE(p_raw->'pricing'->>'pricing_model', pricing_model),
         pricing_category  = COALESCE(p_raw->'pricing'->>'category', pricing_category),
         raw_response      = COALESCE(p_raw, raw_response)
   WHERE wa_message_id = p_wa_message_id;
  GET DIAGNOSTICS v_updated = ROW_COUNT;
  RETURN jsonb_build_object('ok', v_updated > 0, 'updated', v_updated);
END;
$function$

    NULLIF(p_payload->>'status', ''),
    NULLIF(p_payload->>'name_status', ''),
    NULLIF(p_payload->>'code_verification_status', ''),
    p_payload || jsonb_build_object('_source', 'graph_polling')
  )
  RETURNING id INTO v_id;

  RETURN v_id;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.register_payment(p_correlation_id text, p_matricula text, p_name text, p_whatsapp text, p_valor numeric, p_data_pagamento timestamp with time zone, p_regua text, p_forma text, p_comprovante text, p_unit_id uuid, p_gateway_charge_id text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_id bigint;
  v_already_exists boolean := false;
  v_resolved_gateway_id text;
BEGIN
  IF p_gateway_charge_id IS NULL THEN
    SELECT gateway_charge_id INTO v_resolved_gateway_id
    FROM links_pagamentos_gerados
    WHERE correlation_id = p_correlation_id
    LIMIT 1;
  ELSE
    v_resolved_gateway_id := p_gateway_charge_id;
  END IF;

  INSERT INTO pagamentos
    (correlation_id, matricula, name, whatsapp, valor,
     data_pagamento, regua, forma_pagamento, comprovante, unit_id, gateway_charge_id)
  VALUES
    (p_correlation_id, p_matricula, p_name, p_whatsapp, p_valor,
     p_data_pagamento, p_regua, p_forma, p_comprovante, p_unit_id, v_resolved_gateway_id)
  ON CONFLICT (correlation_id) WHERE correlation_id IS NOT NULL
    DO UPDATE SET
      gateway_charge_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.gateway_charge_id, pagamentos.gateway_charge_id)
  RETURNING id INTO v_id;

  SELECT (created_at >= NOW() - interval '5 seconds') = false INTO v_already_exists
  FROM pagamentos WHERE id = v_id;

  IF NOT v_already_exists THEN
    -- Strategic Swarm F1/T7: alem do pagamento_feito historico, limpa lock e
    -- marca branch_state='pago' pra cliente sair imediatamente do limbo do
    -- picker (sem esperar lock de 10min expirar).
    UPDATE clientes_cobranca_setembro
      SET pagamento_feito                = true,
          data_pagamento                 = p_data_pagamento,
          plataforma_pagamento_utilizada = p_forma,
          cadence_proximo_envio_at       = NULL,
          cadence_branch_state           = CASE
            WHEN cadence_fase IS NOT NULL THEN 'pago'
            ELSE cadence_branch_state
          END
    WHERE matricula = p_matricula;

    UPDATE clientes_cobranca_dashboard
      SET pagamento_feito                = true,
          data_pagamento                 = p_data_pagamento,
          plataforma_pagamento_utilizada = p_forma,
          correlation_id                 = p_correlation_id
    WHERE matricula = p_matricula;
  END IF;

  -- P1.2: marcar o link como paid (idempotente -- mesmo se already_existed,
  -- garante consistencia entre pagamentos e links_pagamentos_gerados).
  -- Nao toca se ja estiver em estado terminal diferente (cancelled/expired).
  UPDATE links_pagamentos_gerados
    SET status     = 'paid',
        updated_at = now()
    WHERE correlation_id = p_correlation_id
      AND status = 'pending'
      AND cancelado_at IS NULL;

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    'ok', true,
    'pagamento_id', v_id,
    'already_existed', v_already_exists,
    'gateway_charge_id', v_resolved_gateway_id
  );
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.rpc_dispatches_hourly(_unit_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid)
 RETURNS TABLE(hour integer, avg_count numeric, today_count bigint)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  WITH bounds AS (
    SELECT
      (now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date        AS today,
      (now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date - 30   AS hist_start
  ),
  allowed AS (
    SELECT u.id AS unit_id FROM public.units u
    WHERE public.has_role(auth.uid(), 'admin'::app_role)
    UNION
    SELECT uup.unit_id FROM public.user_unit_permissions uup
    WHERE uup.user_id = auth.uid() AND COALESCE(uup.is_active, true)
  ),
  rows AS (
    SELECT (m.sent_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo') AS local_ts
    FROM public.message_log m, bounds b
    WHERE m.sent_at >= (b.hist_start::timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')
      AND m.unit_id IN (SELECT unit_id FROM allowed)
      AND (_unit_id IS NULL OR m.unit_id = _unit_id)
  ),
  hist AS (
    SELECT extract(hour FROM r.local_ts)::int AS h, r.local_ts::date AS d
    FROM rows r, bounds b
    WHERE r.local_ts::date < b.today
      AND extract(isodow FROM r.local_ts) <= 5
  ),
  hist_days AS (SELECT GREATEST(COUNT(DISTINCT d), 1)::numeric AS n FROM hist),
  hist_by_hour AS (SELECT h, COUNT(*)::numeric AS total FROM hist GROUP BY h),
  today_by_hour AS (
    SELECT extract(hour FROM r.local_ts)::int AS h, COUNT(*)::bigint AS total
    FROM rows r, bounds b
    WHERE r.local_ts::date = b.today
    GROUP BY 1
  ),
  hours AS (SELECT generate_series(0, 23) AS hour)
  SELECT
    hr.hour,
    COALESCE(ROUND(hb.total / (SELECT n FROM hist_days), 2), 0) AS avg_count,
    COALESCE(tb.total, 0) AS today_count
  FROM hours hr
  LEFT JOIN hist_by_hour  hb ON hb.h = hr.hour
  LEFT JOIN today_by_hour tb ON tb.h = hr.hour
  ORDER BY hr.hour;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.rpc_failure_codes(_unit_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid)
 RETURNS TABLE(failure_code text, failure_reason text, total bigint)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  WITH allowed AS (
    SELECT u.id AS unit_id
    FROM public.units u
    WHERE public.has_role(auth.uid(), 'admin'::app_role)
    UNION
    SELECT uup.unit_id
    FROM public.user_unit_permissions uup
    WHERE uup.user_id = auth.uid()
      AND COALESCE(uup.is_active, true)
  )
  SELECT
    COALESCE(ml.failure_code::text, '—') AS failure_code,
    MIN(ml.failure_reason)               AS failure_reason,
    COUNT(*)::bigint                     AS total
  FROM public.message_log ml
  WHERE ml.status = 'failed'
    AND ml.sent_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
    AND ml.unit_id IN (SELECT unit_id FROM allowed)
    AND (_unit_id IS NULL OR ml.unit_id = _unit_id)
  GROUP BY 1
  ORDER BY 3 DESC;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.rpc_inbound_summary(_unit_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid)
 RETURNS TABLE(unit_id uuid, bi_name text, delivered_total bigint, interactions bigint, optout_total bigint, pct_response numeric)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  WITH allowed AS (
    SELECT u.id AS unit_id
    FROM public.units u
    WHERE public.has_role(auth.uid(), 'admin'::app_role)
    UNION
    SELECT uup.unit_id
    FROM public.user_unit_permissions uup
    WHERE uup.user_id = auth.uid()
      AND COALESCE(uup.is_active, true)
  ),
  bounds AS (
    SELECT (now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date AS today
  ),
  deliv AS (
    SELECT ml.unit_id AS uid,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ml.status IN ('delivered','read'))::bigint
             AS delivered_total
    FROM public.message_log ml, bounds b
    WHERE (ml.sent_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date = b.today
      AND ml.unit_id IN (SELECT unit_id FROM allowed)
      AND (_unit_id IS NULL OR ml.unit_id = _unit_id)
    GROUP BY ml.unit_id
  ),
  inter AS (
    SELECT c.unit_id AS uid, COUNT(*)::bigint AS interactions
    FROM public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard c, bounds b
    WHERE (c.data_ultima_mensagem_temp AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date
            = b.today
      AND c.unit_id IN (SELECT unit_id FROM allowed)
      AND (_unit_id IS NULL OR c.unit_id = _unit_id)
    GROUP BY c.unit_id
  ),
  opt AS (
    SELECT mi.unit_id AS uid,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mi.is_optout)::bigint AS optout_total
    FROM public.message_inbound mi, bounds b
    WHERE (mi.received_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date = b.today
      AND mi.unit_id IN (SELECT unit_id FROM allowed)
      AND (_unit_id IS NULL OR mi.unit_id = _unit_id)
    GROUP BY mi.unit_id
  ),
  merged AS (
    SELECT
      COALESCE(d.uid, i.uid, o.uid)        AS uid,
      COALESCE(d.delivered_total, 0)       AS delivered_total,
      COALESCE(i.interactions, 0)          AS interactions,
      COALESCE(o.optout_total, 0)          AS optout_total
    FROM deliv d
    FULL OUTER JOIN inter i ON d.uid = i.uid
    FULL OUTER JOIN opt   o ON COALESCE(d.uid, i.uid) = o.uid
  )
  SELECT
    m.uid AS unit_id,
    u.bi_name,
    m.delivered_total,
    m.interactions,
    m.optout_total,
    ROUND(100.0 * m.interactions / NULLIF(m.delivered_total, 0), 1)
      AS pct_response
  FROM merged m
  LEFT JOIN public.units u ON u.id = m.uid
  ORDER BY m.interactions DESC;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.rpc_message_cost(_unit_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid)
 RETURNS TABLE(pricing_category text, total bigint, billable bigint)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  WITH allowed AS (
    SELECT u.id AS unit_id
    FROM public.units u
    WHERE public.has_role(auth.uid(), 'admin'::app_role)
    UNION
    SELECT uup.unit_id
    FROM public.user_unit_permissions uup
    WHERE uup.user_id = auth.uid()
      AND COALESCE(uup.is_active, true)
  )
  SELECT
    COALESCE(ml.pricing_category, 'sem categoria')      AS pricing_category,
    COUNT(*)::bigint                                    AS total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ml.pricing_billable)::bigint AS billable
  FROM public.message_log ml
  WHERE ml.sent_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
    AND ml.unit_id IN (SELECT unit_id FROM allowed)
    AND (_unit_id IS NULL OR ml.unit_id = _unit_id)
  GROUP BY 1
  ORDER BY 2 DESC;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.rpc_phone_health_last_change(_unit_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid)
 RETURNS TABLE(phone_number_id text, changed_at timestamp with time zone, direction text)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  WITH allowed AS (
    SELECT u.id AS unit_id FROM public.units u
    WHERE public.has_role(auth.uid(), 'admin'::app_role)
    UNION
    SELECT uup.unit_id FROM public.user_unit_permissions uup
    WHERE uup.user_id = auth.uid() AND COALESCE(uup.is_active, true)
  ),
  rated AS (
    SELECT ph.phone_number_id::text AS phone_number_id, ph.observed_at,
      CASE ph.quality_rating
        WHEN 'GREEN' THEN 2 WHEN 'YELLOW' THEN 1 WHEN 'RED' THEN 0 ELSE NULL
      END AS score
    FROM public.phone_health ph
    WHERE ph.unit_id IN (SELECT unit_id FROM allowed)
      AND (_unit_id IS NULL OR ph.unit_id = _unit_id)
  ),
  with_prev AS (
    SELECT phone_number_id, observed_at, score,
      LAG(score) OVER (PARTITION BY phone_number_id ORDER BY observed_at) AS prev_score
    FROM rated WHERE score IS NOT NULL
  ),
  transitions AS (
    SELECT phone_number_id, observed_at, score, prev_score
    FROM with_prev
    WHERE prev_score IS NOT NULL AND score <> prev_score
  ),
  last_tx AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (phone_number_id)
      phone_number_id, observed_at, score, prev_score
    FROM transitions
    ORDER BY phone_number_id, observed_at DESC
  )
  SELECT phone_number_id, observed_at AS changed_at,
    CASE WHEN score > prev_score THEN 'up' ELSE 'down' END AS direction
  FROM last_tx;
$function$

definicao:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.sentinel_register_variation(p_parent_inventory_id bigint, p_new_template_name text, p_new_body_text text, p_waba_id text, p_unit_code text, p_meta_template_id text, p_rationale text, p_variation_input jsonb, p_variation_output jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_parent     template_inventory%ROWTYPE;
  v_new_id     BIGINT;
  v_gen        INT;
BEGIN
  SELECT * INTO v_parent FROM template_inventory WHERE id = p_parent_inventory_id;
  IF NOT FOUND THEN
    RETURN jsonb_build_object('ok', false, 'error', 'parent_not_found');
  END IF;
  v_gen := COALESCE(v_parent.sentinel_generation, 0) + 1;

  INSERT INTO template_inventory(
    template_name, waba_id, unit_code, category, status,
    submitted_at, body_text,
    parent_template_inventory_id, sentinel_generation,
    meta_template_id, sentinel_variation_rationale,
    sentinel_variation_input, sentinel_variation_output,
    submitted_to_meta_at, is_active_in_cadence
  ) VALUES (
    p_new_template_name, p_waba_id, p_unit_code, 'UTILITY', 'PENDING',
    now(), p_new_body_text,
    p_parent_inventory_id, v_gen,
    p_meta_template_id, p_rationale,
    p_variation_input, p_variation_output,
    now(), false
  )
  ON CONFLICT (template_name, waba_id) DO UPDATE SET
    body_text = EXCLUDED.body_text,
    parent_template_inventory_id = EXCLUDED.parent_template_inventory_id,
    sentinel_generation = EXCLUDED.sentinel_generation,
    sentinel_variation_rationale = EXCLUDED.sentinel_variation_rationale,
    sentinel_variation_input = EXCLUDED.sentinel_variation_input,
    sentinel_variation_output = EXCLUDED.sentinel_variation_output,
    submitted_to_meta_at = EXCLUDED.submitted_to_meta_at,
    status = EXCLUDED.status,
    submitted_at = EXCLUDED.submitted_at,
    updated_at = now()
  RETURNING id INTO v_new_id;

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    'ok', true,
    'new_inventory_id', v_new_id,
    'parent_inventory_id', p_parent_inventory_id,
    'generation', v_gen
  );
END;
$function$

args: p_new_records jsonb, p_updated_records jsonb, p_deleted_matriculas text[], p_paid_matriculas text[], p_dry_run boolean
definicao:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.sync_cobranca_batch(p_new_records jsonb DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb, p_updated_records jsonb DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb, p_deleted_matriculas text[] DEFAULT '{}'::text[], p_paid_matriculas text[] DEFAULT '{}'::text[], p_dry_run boolean DEFAULT false)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_rec jsonb;
  v_matricula text;
  v_is_nr boolean;
  v_created int := 0;
  v_updated int := 0;
  v_deleted int := 0;
  v_paid_removed int := 0;
  v_cadence_initialized int := 0;
BEGIN
  -- 1. NOVOS REGISTROS
  -- Strategic Swarm F1: novos clientes NR ganham cadence_fase='00' (F0 dia 1) on insert.
  -- Outras réguas: cadence_* = NULL (comportamento atual preservado).
  FOR v_rec IN SELECT * FROM jsonb_array_elements(p_new_records) LOOP
    v_is_nr := (v_rec->>'regua' = 'NR');

    IF NOT p_dry_run THEN
      INSERT INTO clientes_cobranca_setembro
        (matricula, name, whatsapp, valor_inadimplente, regua, status,
         "forma de pagamento", unit_id,
         cadence_fase, cadence_dia_ciclo, cadence_branch_state,
         cadence_entrou_em, regua_at_entry, slots_enviados_hoje)
      VALUES (
        v_rec->>'matricula',
        v_rec->>'name',
        v_rec->>'whatsapp',
        (v_rec->>'valor_inadimplente')::numeric,
        v_rec->>'regua',
        COALESCE(v_rec->>'status', 'novo'),
        v_rec->>'forma_pagamento',
        (v_rec->>'unit_id')::uuid,
        CASE WHEN v_is_nr THEN '00' ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN v_is_nr THEN 1 ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN v_is_nr THEN 'normal' ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN v_is_nr THEN now() ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN v_is_nr THEN 'NR' ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN v_is_nr THEN 0 ELSE NULL END
      )
      ON CONFLICT (matricula) DO UPDATE SET
        name = EXCLUDED.name,
        whatsapp = EXCLUDED.whatsapp,
        valor_inadimplente = EXCLUDED.valor_inadimplente,
        regua = EXCLUDED.regua,
        status = EXCLUDED.status,
        "forma de pagamento" = EXCLUDED."forma de pagamento",
        unit_id = EXCLUDED.unit_id,
        updated_at = now();
      -- NOTA: ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE não toca em cadence_* — preserva estado
      -- do cliente que já estava na régua.

      INSERT INTO clientes_cobranca_dashboard
        (matricula, name, whatsapp, valor_inadimplente, regua, status,
         "forma de pagamento", unit_id, bi_atual,
         cadence_fase, cadence_dia_ciclo, cadence_branch_state,
         cadence_entrou_em, regua_at_entry, slots_enviados_hoje)
      VALUES (
        v_rec->>'matricula',
        v_rec->>'name',
        v_rec->>'whatsapp',
        (v_rec->>'valor_inadimplente')::numeric,
        v_rec->>'regua',
        COALESCE(v_rec->>'status', 'novo'),
        v_rec->>'forma_pagamento',
        (v_rec->>'unit_id')::uuid,
        true,
        CASE WHEN v_is_nr THEN '00' ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN v_is_nr THEN 1 ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN v_is_nr THEN 'normal' ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN v_is_nr THEN now() ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN v_is_nr THEN 'NR' ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN v_is_nr THEN 0 ELSE NULL END
      )
      ON CONFLICT (matricula) DO UPDATE SET
        name = EXCLUDED.name,
        whatsapp = EXCLUDED.whatsapp,
        valor_inadimplente = EXCLUDED.valor_inadimplente,
        regua = EXCLUDED.regua,
        status = EXCLUDED.status,
        "forma de pagamento" = EXCLUDED."forma de pagamento",
        unit_id = EXCLUDED.unit_id,
        bi_atual = true,
        disparos_equipe = 0,
        updated_at = now();
    END IF;

    IF v_is_nr THEN
      v_cadence_initialized := v_cadence_initialized + 1;
    END IF;
    v_created := v_created + 1;
  END LOOP;

  -- 2. ATUALIZADOS (comportamento idêntico ao original)
  FOR v_rec IN SELECT * FROM jsonb_array_elements(p_updated_records) LOOP
    IF NOT p_dry_run THEN
      UPDATE clientes_cobranca_setembro SET
        whatsapp = COALESCE(v_rec->>'whatsapp', whatsapp),
        valor_inadimplente = COALESCE((v_rec->>'valor_inadimplente')::numeric, valor_inadimplente),
        regua = COALESCE(v_rec->>'regua', regua),
        "forma de pagamento" = COALESCE(v_rec->>'forma_pagamento', "forma de pagamento"),
        unit_id = COALESCE((v_rec->>'unit_id')::uuid, unit_id),
        updated_at = now()
      WHERE matricula = v_rec->>'matricula';

      UPDATE clientes_cobranca_dashboard SET
        whatsapp = COALESCE(v_rec->>'whatsapp', whatsapp),
        valor_inadimplente = COALESCE((v_rec->>'valor_inadimplente')::numeric, valor_inadimplente),
        regua = COALESCE(v_rec->>'regua', regua),
        "forma de pagamento" = COALESCE(v_rec->>'forma_pagamento', "forma de pagamento"),
        unit_id = COALESCE((v_rec->>'unit_id')::uuid, unit_id),
        bi_atual = true,
        updated_at = now()
      WHERE matricula = v_rec->>'matricula';
    END IF;
    v_updated := v_updated + 1;
  END LOOP;

  -- 3. DELETADOS (comportamento idêntico ao original)
  FOREACH v_matricula IN ARRAY p_deleted_matriculas LOOP
    IF NOT p_dry_run THEN
      DELETE FROM clientes_cobranca_setembro WHERE matricula = v_matricula;
      UPDATE clientes_cobranca_dashboard
        SET bi_atual = false, updated_at = now()
      WHERE matricula = v_matricula;
    END IF;
    v_deleted := v_deleted + 1;
  END LOOP;

  -- 4. PAGOS (comportamento idêntico ao original)
  FOREACH v_matricula IN ARRAY p_paid_matriculas LOOP
    IF NOT p_dry_run THEN
      DELETE FROM clientes_cobranca_setembro
      WHERE matricula = v_matricula AND pagamento_feito = true;
    END IF;
    v_paid_removed := v_paid_removed + 1;
  END LOOP;

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    'ok', true,
    'created', v_created,
    'updated', v_updated,
    'deleted', v_deleted,
    'paid_removed', v_paid_removed,
    'cadence_initialized', v_cadence_initialized,
    'dry_run', p_dry_run
  );
END;
$function$

args: p_unit_id uuid, p_file_id text, p_file_name text, p_records jsonb, p_validation_errors jsonb, p_skipped jsonb, p_header_row integer, p_converted_file_id text, p_abort_rule text, p_abort_reason text, p_sanity_min_ratio numeric, p_sanity_min_baseline integer, p_dry_run boolean
definicao:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.sync_cobranca_v2(p_unit_id uuid, p_file_id text, p_file_name text, p_records jsonb, p_validation_errors jsonb DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb, p_skipped jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb, p_header_row integer DEFAULT NULL::integer, p_converted_file_id text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_abort_rule text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_abort_reason text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_sanity_min_ratio numeric DEFAULT 0.70, p_sanity_min_baseline integer DEFAULT 50, p_dry_run boolean DEFAULT false)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public', 'pg_temp'
 SET statement_timeout TO '180s'
AS $function$
declare
  v_today          date := (now() at time zone 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date;
  v_log_id         bigint;
  v_log_status     text;
  v_unit_name      text;
  v_sheet_count    integer := coalesce(jsonb_array_length(p_records), 0);
  v_db_count       integer;
  v_created        integer := 0;
  v_updated        integer := 0;
  v_deleted        integer := 0;
  v_paid_removed   integer := 0;
  v_abort_rule     text := null;
  v_abort_reason   text := null;
  v_regua_transicao jsonb := '{}'::jsonb;
  v_regua_dist     jsonb := '{}'::jsonb;
  v_total          integer := 0;
  v_valor_total    numeric := 0;
  v_aging          numeric := null;
  v_prev           record;
  v_valor_delta    numeric := null;
  v_total_delta    integer := null;
  v_sanity         jsonb;
begin
  if p_abort_rule is not null then
    if not p_dry_run then
      delete from public.spreadsheet_sync_log where file_id = p_file_id;
      insert into public.spreadsheet_sync_log
        (file_id, file_name, converted_file_id, status, records_in_sheet,
         validation_errors, header_row_detected, abort_rule, abort_reason,
         sanity_metrics, started_at, completed_at)
      values
        (p_file_id, p_file_name, p_converted_file_id, 'aborted',
         coalesce(jsonb_array_length(p_records), 0), p_validation_errors,
         p_header_row, p_abort_rule, p_abort_reason,
         jsonb_build_object('skipped', p_skipped), now(), now());
    end if;
    return jsonb_build_object(
      'ok', false, 'status', 'aborted',
      'abort_rule', p_abort_rule, 'abort_reason', p_abort_reason,
      'file_id', p_file_id, 'file_name', p_file_name, 'unit_name', null,
      'converted_file_id', p_converted_file_id, 'dry_run', p_dry_run);
  end if;

  perform pg_advisory_xact_lock(hashtext('sync_cobranca'), hashtext(p_unit_id::text));

  select name into v_unit_name from public.units where id = p_unit_id;

  select status into v_log_status
  from public.spreadsheet_sync_log
  where file_id = p_file_id;

  if v_log_status = 'completed' and not p_dry_run then
    return jsonb_build_object('ok', true, 'status', 'skipped_already_completed',
                              'dry_run', false,
                              'file_id', p_file_id, 'file_name', p_file_name,
                              'unit_name', v_unit_name,
                              'converted_file_id', p_converted_file_id);
  end if;

  create temp table _sheet on commit drop as
  select distinct on (matricula) *
  from jsonb_to_recordset(p_records) as x(
    matricula          text,
    name               text,
    whatsapp           text,
    valor_inadimplente numeric,
    regua              text,
    forma_pagamento    text,
    status             text
  )
  where matricula is not null and matricula <> ''
  order by matricula;

  create index on _sheet (matricula);
  analyze _sheet;

  v_sheet_count := (select count(*) from _sheet);
  v_db_count    := (select count(*) from public.clientes_cobranca_setembro
                    where unit_id = p_unit_id);

  v_sanity := jsonb_build_object(
    'sheet_count', v_sheet_count,
    'db_count', v_db_count,
    'min_ratio', p_sanity_min_ratio,
    'min_baseline', p_sanity_min_baseline
  );

  if v_sheet_count = 0 then
    v_abort_rule := 'empty_sheet';
    v_abort_reason := 'Planilha sem linhas validas.';
  elsif v_db_count >= p_sanity_min_baseline
        and v_sheet_count < (v_db_count::numeric * p_sanity_min_ratio) then
    v_abort_rule := 'partial_export';
    v_abort_reason := format(
      'Export parcial suspeito: %s linhas validas vs %s na base (minimo %s%%).',
      v_sheet_count, v_db_count, round(p_sanity_min_ratio * 100));
  end if;

  if v_abort_rule is not null then
    if not p_dry_run then
      delete from public.spreadsheet_sync_log where file_id = p_file_id;
      insert into public.spreadsheet_sync_log
        (file_id, file_name, converted_file_id, status, records_in_sheet,
         validation_errors, header_row_detected, abort_rule, abort_reason,
         sanity_metrics, started_at, completed_at)
      values
        (p_file_id, p_file_name, p_converted_file_id, 'aborted', v_sheet_count,
         p_validation_errors, p_header_row, v_abort_rule, v_abort_reason,
         v_sanity, now(), now());
    end if;
    return jsonb_build_object(
      'ok', false, 'status', 'aborted',
      'abort_rule', v_abort_rule, 'abort_reason', v_abort_reason,
      'sanity_metrics', v_sanity, 'dry_run', p_dry_run,
      'file_id', p_file_id, 'file_name', p_file_name,
      'unit_name', v_unit_name,
      'converted_file_id', p_converted_file_id);
  end if;

  if not p_dry_run then
    delete from public.spreadsheet_sync_log where file_id = p_file_id;
    insert into public.spreadsheet_sync_log
      (file_id, file_name, converted_file_id, status, header_row_detected,
       validation_errors, sanity_metrics, started_at)
    values
      (p_file_id, p_file_name, p_converted_file_id, 'processing', p_header_row,
       p_validation_errors, v_sanity, now())
    returning id into v_log_id;
  end if;

  v_created := (
    select count(*) from _sheet s
    where not exists (select 1 from public.clientes_cobranca_setembro c
                      where c.matricula = s.matricula));

  v_updated := (
    select count(*) from _sheet s
    join public.clientes_cobranca_setembro c on c.matricula = s.matricula
    where c.pagamento_feito = false
      and ( coalesce(c.whatsapp,'')             is distinct from coalesce(s.whatsapp,'')
         or coalesce(c.regua,'')                is distinct from coalesce(s.regua,'')
         or coalesce(c.valor_inadimplente,0)    is distinct from coalesce(s.valor_inadimplente,0)
         or coalesce(c."forma de pagamento",'') is distinct from coalesce(s.forma_pagamento,'')
         or c.unit_id is distinct from p_unit_id ));

  v_deleted := (
    select count(*) from public.clientes_cobranca_setembro c
    where c.unit_id = p_unit_id and c.pagamento_feito = false
      and not exists (select 1 from _sheet s where s.matricula = c.matricula));

  v_paid_removed := (
    select count(*) from public.clientes_cobranca_setembro c
    where c.unit_id = p_unit_id and c.pagamento_feito = true);

  select coalesce(jsonb_object_agg(t.k, t.cnt), '{}'::jsonb) into v_regua_transicao
  from (
    select (coalesce(c.regua,'(null)') || '->' || coalesce(s.regua,'(null)')) as k,
           count(*) as cnt
    from _sheet s
    join public.clientes_cobranca_setembro c on c.matricula = s.matricula
    where c.unit_id = p_unit_id and c.pagamento_feito = false
      and coalesce(c.regua,'') is distinct from coalesce(s.regua,'')
    group by 1
  ) t;

  if p_dry_run then
    return jsonb_build_object(
      'ok', true, 'status', 'dry_run', 'dry_run', true,
      'created', v_created, 'updated', v_updated,
      'deleted', v_deleted, 'paid_removed', v_paid_removed,
      'regua_transicao', v_regua_transicao, 'sanity_metrics', v_sanity,
      'file_id', p_file_id, 'file_name', p_file_name,
      'unit_name', v_unit_name,
      'converted_file_id', p_converted_file_id);
  end if;

  -- 0) FOTO PRE-SYNC (reversibilidade) — captura por unidade E por matricula da planilha
  insert into public.cobranca_sync_backup
    (sync_log_id, unit_id, snapshot_date, source_table, row_data)
  select v_log_id, p_unit_id, v_today, 'clientes_cobranca_setembro', to_jsonb(c.*)
  from public.clientes_cobranca_setembro c
  where c.unit_id = p_unit_id
     or c.matricula in (select matricula from _sheet);

  insert into public.cobranca_sync_backup
    (sync_log_id, unit_id, snapshot_date, source_table, row_data)
  select v_log_id, p_unit_id, v_today, 'clientes_cobranca_dashboard', to_jsonb(d.*)
  from public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard d
  where d.unit_id = p_unit_id
     or d.matricula in (select matricula from _sheet);

  delete from public.cobranca_sync_backup where created_at < now() - interval '14 days';

  insert into public.clientes_cobranca_setembro
    (matricula, name, whatsapp, valor_inadimplente, regua, status,
     "forma de pagamento", unit_id, cadence_fase, cadence_dia_ciclo,
     cadence_branch_state, cadence_entrou_em, regua_at_entry, slots_enviados_hoje)
  select s.matricula, s.name, s.whatsapp, s.valor_inadimplente, s.regua,
         coalesce(s.status, 'novo'), s.forma_pagamento, p_unit_id,
         case when s.regua = 'NR' then '00'     end,
         case when s.regua = 'NR' then 1        end,
         case when s.regua = 'NR' then 'normal' end,
         case when s.regua = 'NR' then now()    end,
         case when s.regua = 'NR' then 'NR'     end,
         case when s.regua = 'NR' then 0        end
  from _sheet s
  where not exists (select 1 from public.clientes_cobranca_setembro c
                    where c.matricula = s.matricula);

  insert into public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard
    (matricula, name, whatsapp, valor_inadimplente, regua, status,
     "forma de pagamento", unit_id, bi_atual, cadence_fase, cadence_dia_ciclo,
     cadence_branch_state, cadence_entrou_em, regua_at_entry, slots_enviados_hoje)
  select s.matricula, s.name, s.whatsapp, s.valor_inadimplente, s.regua,
         coalesce(s.status, 'novo'), s.forma_pagamento, p_unit_id, true,
         case when s.regua = 'NR' then '00'     end,
         case when s.regua = 'NR' then 1        end,
         case when s.regua = 'NR' then 'normal' end,
         case when s.regua = 'NR' then now()    end,
         case when s.regua = 'NR' then 'NR'     end,
         case when s.regua = 'NR' then 0        end
  from _sheet s
  where not exists (select 1 from public.clientes_cobranca_setembro c
                    where c.matricula = s.matricula)
  on conflict (matricula) do update set
    name                 = excluded.name,
    whatsapp             = excluded.whatsapp,
    valor_inadimplente   = excluded.valor_inadimplente,
    regua                = excluded.regua,
    status               = excluded.status,
    "forma de pagamento" = excluded."forma de pagamento",
    unit_id              = excluded.unit_id,
    bi_atual             = true,
    disparos_equipe      = 0,
    updated_at           = now();

  update public.clientes_cobranca_setembro c set
    whatsapp             = s.whatsapp,
    valor_inadimplente   = s.valor_inadimplente,
    regua                = s.regua,
    "forma de pagamento" = s.forma_pagamento,
    unit_id              = p_unit_id,
    updated_at           = now()
  from _sheet s
  where c.matricula = s.matricula and c.pagamento_feito = false
    and ( coalesce(c.whatsapp,'')             is distinct from coalesce(s.whatsapp,'')
       or coalesce(c.regua,'')                is distinct from coalesce(s.regua,'')
       or coalesce(c.valor_inadimplente,0)    is distinct from coalesce(s.valor_inadimplente,0)
       or coalesce(c."forma de pagamento",'') is distinct from coalesce(s.forma_pagamento,'')
       or c.unit_id is distinct from p_unit_id );

  update public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard c set
    whatsapp             = s.whatsapp,
    valor_inadimplente   = s.valor_inadimplente,
    regua                = s.regua,
    "forma de pagamento" = s.forma_pagamento,
    unit_id              = p_unit_id,
    bi_atual             = true,
    updated_at           = now()
  from _sheet s
  where c.matricula = s.matricula
    and ( coalesce(c.whatsapp,'')             is distinct from coalesce(s.whatsapp,'')
       or coalesce(c.regua,'')                is distinct from coalesce(s.regua,'')
       or coalesce(c.valor_inadimplente,0)    is distinct from coalesce(s.valor_inadimplente,0)
       or coalesce(c."forma de pagamento",'') is distinct from coalesce(s.forma_pagamento,'')
       or c.unit_id  is distinct from p_unit_id
       or c.bi_atual is distinct from true );

  with del as (
    delete from public.clientes_cobranca_setembro c
    where c.unit_id = p_unit_id and c.pagamento_feito = false
      and not exists (select 1 from _sheet s where s.matricula = c.matricula)
    returning c.*
  )
  insert into public.cobranca_clientes_removidos
    (matricula, name, whatsapp, unit_id, regua_no_momento, status_no_momento,
     valor_no_momento, motivo, dias_na_base, entrou_em, removido_em,
     sync_log_id, snapshot_date)
  select matricula, name, whatsapp, unit_id, regua, status,
         valor_inadimplente, 'sumiu_da_planilha',
         greatest(0, v_today - (created_at at time zone 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date),
         created_at, now(), v_log_id, v_today
  from del;

  with del as (
    delete from public.clientes_cobranca_setembro c
    where c.unit_id = p_unit_id and c.pagamento_feito = true
    returning c.*
  )
  insert into public.cobranca_clientes_removidos
    (matricula, name, whatsapp, unit_id, regua_no_momento, status_no_momento,
     valor_no_momento, motivo, dias_na_base, entrou_em, removido_em,
     sync_log_id, snapshot_date)
  select matricula, name, whatsapp, unit_id, regua, status,
         valor_inadimplente, 'pagamento_feito',
         greatest(0, v_today - (created_at at time zone 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date),
         created_at, now(), v_log_id, v_today
  from del;

  update public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard d set
    bi_atual = false, updated_at = now()
  where d.unit_id = p_unit_id
    and not exists (select 1 from public.clientes_cobranca_setembro c
                    where c.matricula = d.matricula);

  select count(*),
         coalesce(sum(valor_inadimplente), 0),
         round(avg(v_today - (created_at at time zone 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date), 1)
  into v_total, v_valor_total, v_aging
  from public.clientes_cobranca_setembro
  where unit_id = p_unit_id;

  select coalesce(jsonb_object_agg(d.regua, d.cnt), '{}'::jsonb) into v_regua_dist
  from (
    select coalesce(regua, '(null)') as regua, count(*) as cnt
    from public.clientes_cobranca_setembro
    where unit_id = p_unit_id
    group by 1
  ) d;

  select * into v_prev
  from public.sync_snapshots
  where unit_id = p_unit_id and snapshot_date < v_today
  order by snapshot_date desc
  limit 1;

  if found then
    v_valor_delta := v_valor_total - v_prev.valor_total;
    v_total_delta := v_total - v_prev.total_clientes;
  end if;

  insert into public.sync_snapshots
    (unit_id, snapshot_date, sync_log_id, entradas, saidas, saidas_pagamento,
     saidas_sumiu, atualizados, total_clientes, valor_total, aging_medio_dias,
     regua_distribuicao, regua_transicao, valor_total_delta, total_clientes_delta)
  values
    (p_unit_id, v_today, v_log_id, v_created, v_deleted + v_paid_removed,
     v_paid_removed, v_deleted, v_updated, v_total, v_valor_total, v_aging,
     v_regua_dist, v_regua_transicao, v_valor_delta, v_total_delta)
  on conflict (unit_id, snapshot_date) do update set
    sync_log_id          = excluded.sync_log_id,
    entradas             = excluded.entradas,
    saidas               = excluded.saidas,
    saidas_pagamento     = excluded.saidas_pagamento,
    saidas_sumiu         = excluded.saidas_sumiu,
    atualizados          = excluded.atualizados,
    total_clientes       = excluded.total_clientes,
    valor_total          = excluded.valor_total,
    aging_medio_dias     = excluded.aging_medio_dias,
    regua_distribuicao   = excluded.regua_distribuicao,
    regua_transicao      = excluded.regua_transicao,
    valor_total_delta    = excluded.valor_total_delta,
    total_clientes_delta = excluded.total_clientes_delta;

  update public.spreadsheet_sync_log set
    status              = 'completed',
    records_in_sheet    = v_sheet_count,
    records_created     = v_created,
    records_updated     = v_updated,
    records_deleted     = v_deleted,
    records_paid_removed = v_paid_removed,
    records_skipped     = coalesce((p_skipped->>'total')::int, 0),
    completed_at        = now()
  where id = v_log_id;

  return jsonb_build_object(
    'ok', true, 'status', 'completed', 'dry_run', false,
    'sync_log_id', v_log_id,
    'file_id', p_file_id, 'file_name', p_file_name,
    'unit_name', v_unit_name,
    'converted_file_id', p_converted_file_id,
    'created', v_created, 'updated', v_updated,
    'deleted', v_deleted, 'paid_removed', v_paid_removed,
    'total_clientes', v_total, 'valor_total', v_valor_total,
    'aging_medio_dias', v_aging,
    'regua_distribuicao', v_regua_dist,
    'regua_transicao', v_regua_transicao,
    'valor_total_delta', v_valor_delta,
    'total_clientes_delta', v_total_delta);
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.sync_data_ultimo_disparo_from_message_log()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_sent_date date;
BEGIN
  -- data_ultimo_disparo e tipo DATE em ambas as tabelas. Converter para BRT.
  v_sent_date := (NEW.sent_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date;

  IF NEW.matricula IS NULL OR NEW.matricula = '' THEN
    RETURN NEW;
  END IF;

  -- Atualiza setembro (idempotente: so se for mais novo)
  UPDATE public.clientes_cobranca_setembro
  SET data_ultimo_disparo = v_sent_date
  WHERE matricula = NEW.matricula
    AND (data_ultimo_disparo IS NULL OR data_ultimo_disparo < v_sent_date);

  -- Atualiza dashboard (idempotente)
  -- Nota: mirror_disparo_fields_to_dashboard ja espelha de setembro,
  -- mas esse trigger so dispara em UPDATE de setembro. Para matriculas
  -- que pagaram e sairam de setembro (estao so em dashboard), precisamos
  -- atualizar diretamente.
  UPDATE public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard
  SET data_ultimo_disparo = v_sent_date
  WHERE matricula = NEW.matricula
    AND (data_ultimo_disparo IS NULL OR data_ultimo_disparo < v_sent_date);

  RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.upsert_payment_link(p_correlation_id text, p_matricula text, p_whatsapp text, p_link text, p_unit_id uuid, p_plataforma text DEFAULT 'pix'::text, p_data_link timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(), p_gateway_charge_id text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_link text;
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO links_pagamentos_gerados
    (correlation_id, matricula, whatsapp, link_pagamento,
     unit_id, plataforma_pagamento_utilizada, data_link_gerado, gateway_charge_id)
  VALUES
    (p_correlation_id, p_matricula, p_whatsapp, p_link,
     p_unit_id, p_plataforma, p_data_link, p_gateway_charge_id)
  ON CONFLICT (correlation_id) DO UPDATE
    SET link_pagamento = EXCLUDED.link_pagamento,
        gateway_charge_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.gateway_charge_id, links_pagamentos_gerados.gateway_charge_id),
        updated_at = now()
  RETURNING link_pagamento INTO v_link;

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    'ok', true,
    'correlation_id', p_correlation_id,
    'link', v_link
  );
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.user_can_read_unit(_unit_id uuid)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  SELECT
    public.has_role(auth.uid(), 'admin'::app_role)
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM public.user_unit_permissions uup
      WHERE uup.user_id = auth.uid()
        AND uup.unit_id = _unit_id
        AND COALESCE(uup.is_active, true)
    );
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.user_can_read_unit_code(_unit_code text)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  SELECT
    public.has_role(auth.uid(), 'admin'::app_role)
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM public.user_unit_permissions uup
      JOIN public.units u ON u.id = uup.unit_id
      WHERE uup.user_id = auth.uid()
        AND u.code = _unit_code
        AND COALESCE(uup.is_active, true)
    );
$function$
